content: A true friend freely, advises justly, assists readily, adventures boldly, takes all patiently, defends courageously, and continues a friend unchangeably.

content: Life's challenges are not supposed to paralyze you, they're supposed to help you discover who you are.

content: Love doesn't make the world go round; love is what makes the ride worthwhile.

content: Whatever happens, take responsibility.

content: Business, you know, may bring you money, but friendship hardly ever does.

content: He who knows himself is enlightened.

But when Governor Romney and his allies in Congress tell us we can somehow lower our deficit by spending trillions more on new tax breaks for the wealthy - well, you do the math. I refuse to go along with that. And as long as I'm President, I never will.

content: Wisdom has never made a bigot, but learning has.

content: First we thought the PC was a calculator. Then we found out how to turn numbers into letters with ASCII — and we thought it was a typewriter. Then we discovered graphics, and we thought it was a television. With the World Wide Web, we’ve realized it’s a brochure.

content: I cannot even imagine where I would be today were it not for that handful of friends who have given me a heart full of joy. Let's face it, friends make life a lot more fun.

content: Be sure you put your feet in the right place, then stand firm.

content: You'll see it when you believe it.

content: Adversity causes some men to break, others to break records.

content: Technology is the campfire around which we tell our stories.

content: True friendship can afford true knowledge. It does not depend on darkness and ignorance.

Abraham Lincoln
content: I'll prepare and someday my chance will come.
A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.

content: The dream was always running ahead of me. To catch up, to live for a moment in unison with it, that was the miracle.
author: Anaïs Nin

content: Action may not always bring happiness; but there is no happiness without action.

content: In the sky, there is no distinction of east and west; people create distinctions out of their own minds and then believe them to be true.

content: If we could see the miracle of a single flower clearly, our whole life would change.

content: Life a culmination of the past, an awareness of the present, an indication of the future beyond knowledge, the quality that gives a touch of divinity to matter.

content: Impossibilities are merely things which we have not yet learned.

content: Friendship with oneself is all important because without it one cannot be friends with anybody else in the world.

content: First say to yourself what you would be; and then do what you have to do.

content: Fame usually comes to those who are thinking about something else.

content: Give whatever you are doing and whoever you are with the gift of your attention.

content: You cannot have what you do not want.

content: Be the change that you want to see in the world.

content: Bad times have a scientific value. These are occasions a good learner would not miss.

content: You are never given a wish without also being given the power to make it come true. You may have to work for it, however.

content: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.

content: The World is my country, all mankind are my brethren, and to do good is my religion.

content: Nature takes away any faculty that is not used.

content: With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.

content: The word philosophy sounds high-minded, but it simply means the love of wisdom. If you love something, you don't just read about it; you hug it, you mess with it, you play with it, you argue with it.

content: TV and the Internet are good because they keep stupid people from spending too much time out in public.

content: The rule of friendship means there should be mutual sympathy between them, each supplying what the other lacks and trying to benefit the other, always using friendly and sincere words.

content: A house divided against itself cannot stand.

content: No person is your friend who demands your silence or denies your right to grow.

content: Your work is to discover your world and then with all your heart give yourself to it.

content: Always be mindful of the kindness and not the faults of others.
author: Buddha

content: Who looks outside, dreams, who looks inside, awakes.

content: Learning without reflection is a waste, reflection without learning is dangerous.

content: Consider that not only do negative thoughts and emotions destroy our experience of peace, but they also undermine our health.

content: Through meditation and by giving full attention to one thing at a time, we can learn to direct attention where we choose.

content: Accept challenges, so that you may feel the exhilaration of victory.
author: George S. Patton

content: Never idealize others. They will never live up to your expectations.
author: Leo Buscaglia

content: You're never a loser until you quit trying.
author: Mike Ditka

content: Every time you smile at someone, it is an action of love, a gift to that person, a beautiful thing.
author: Mother Teresa

content: You give before you get.

content: And as we let our own light shine, we unconsciously give other people permission to do the same.

content: Men in general judge more from appearances than from reality. All men have eyes, but few have the gift of penetration.

content: In order to live free and happily you must sacrifice boredom. It is not always an easy sacrifice.
author: Richard Bach

content: No man was ever wise by chance.

content: To be beautiful means to be yourself. You don't need to be accepted by others. You need to accept yourself.

content: Permanence, perseverance and persistence in spite of all obstacles, discouragements, and impossibilities: It is this, that in all things distinguishes the strong soul from the weak.

content: Real magic in relationships means an absence of judgement of others.

content: A good head and a good heart are always a formidable combination.

content: If you are bitter, you are like a dry leaf that you can just squash, and you can get blown away by the wind. There is much more wisdom in forgiveness.

content: Honesty is the best policy.
author: Benjamin Franklin

content: Friendship often ends in love, but love in friendship - never.
author: Albert Camus

content: We are shaped by our thoughts; we become what we think. When the mind is pure, joy follows like a shadow that never leaves.
author: Buddha

content: Silence is deep as Eternity; Speech is shallow as Time.
author: Thomas Carlyle

content: You cannot change anything in your life with intention alone, which can become a watered-down, occasional hope that you'll get to tomorrow. Intention without action is useless.
author: Caroline Myss

content: You do not become good by trying to be good, but by finding the goodness that is already within you.
author: Eckhart Tolle

content: There is no charm equal to tenderness of heart.
author: Jane Austen

content: I love you the more in that I believe you had liked me for my own sake and for nothing else.
author: John Keats

content: Reality leaves a lot to the imagination.
author: John Lennon

content: Trust your hunches. They're usually based on facts filed away just below the conscious level.
author: Joyce Brothers

content: I always wanted to be somebody, but I should have been more specific.
author: Lily Tomlin

content: A garden is always a series of losses set against a few triumphs, like life itself.
author: May Sarton

content: We may encounter many defeats, but we must not be defeated.
author: Maya Angelou

content: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

content: They can do all because they think they can.
author: Virgil

content: The pine stays green in winter... wisdom in hardship.
author: Norman Douglas

content: There is a difference between happiness and wisdom: he that thinks himself the happiest man is really so; but he that thinks himself the wisest is generally the greatest fool.

content: This is why I loved technology: if you used it right, it could give you power and privacy.

content: In romance, we feel the need to zoom in and expound on our partner's foibles in intimate detail; in friendship, we tend to do the opposite, avoiding confrontation through fear, lethargy or both.

content: Friendship brings in a lot of honesty and trust into any relationship, especially a marriage.

content: Friendships are the family we make - not the one we inherit. I've always been someone to whom friendship, elective affinities, is as important as family.

content: In friendship as well as love, ignorance very often contributes more to our happiness than knowledge.
author: François de La Rochefoucauld

content: Do good by stealth, and blush to find it fame.
author: Alexander Pope

content: Be kind whenever possible. It is always possible.
author: Dalai Lama

content: Keep silence for the most part, and speak only when you must, and then briefly.
author: Epictetus

content: I do not believe in a fate that falls on men however they act; but I do believe in a fate that falls on man unless they act.
author: G. K. Chesterton

content: If you aren't going all the way, why go at all?
author: Joe Namath

content: Treat people as if they were what they ought to be, and you help them to become what they are capable of being.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

content: Your friend is your needs answered.

Woody Allen

The world is a book, and those who do not travel read only a page.

content: We must not say every mistake is a foolish one.

content: Obstacles are those frightful things you see when you take your eyes off your goal.

content: Almost everything comes from nothing.

content: Happiness often sneaks in through a door you didn't know you left open.

content: When your desires are strong enough you will appear to possess superhuman powers to achieve.

content: The secret of success is constancy to purpose.

content: When you realize how perfect everything is you will tilt your head back and laugh at the sky.

content: I do not believe in a fate that falls on men however they act; but I do believe in a fate that falls on them unless they act.

content: Everything that irritates us about others can lead us to an understanding of ourselves.

content: Genuine love should first be directed at oneself; if we do not love ourselves, how can we love others?

content: Happiness mainly comes from our own attitude, rather than from external factors.

content: To want to be what one can be is purpose in life.

author: Duke Ellington

author: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar

author: Charles Lamb

author: Salvador Dali
content: The terrifying and edible beauty of Art Nouveau architecture.

author: Christopher Marlowe
content: O, thou art fairer than the evening air clad in the beauty of a thousand stars.

author: Andre Gide
content: Through loyalty to the past, our mind refuses to realize that tomorrow's joy is possible only if today's makes way for it that each wave owes the beauty of its line only to the withdrawal of the preceding one.

author: Francis Bacon
content: There is no excellent beauty that hath not some strangeness in the proportion.

author: Martha Beck
content: Although beauty may be in the eye of the beholder, the feeling of being beautiful exists solely in the mind of the beheld.

author: Gwyneth Paltrow
content: Beauty, to me, is about being comfortable in your own skin. That, or a kick-ass red lipstick.

author: William Wordsworth

author: John Ruskin
content: Beauty deprived of its proper foils and adjuncts ceases to be enjoyed as beauty, just as light deprived of all shadows ceases to be enjoyed as light.

content: The kind of beauty I want most is the hard-to-get kind that comes from within - strength, courage, dignity.

author: Langston Hughes
content: Beauty for some provides escape, who gain a happiness in eyeing the gorgeous buttocks of the ape or Autumn sunsets exquisitely dying.

author: Samuel Butler
content: To give pain is the tyranny to make happy, the true empire of beauty.

author: Virginia Woolf
content: The beauty of the world, which is so soon to perish, has two edges, one of laughter, one of anguish, cutting the heart asunder.

author: Michelangelo

author: Simone Weil
content: Beauty always promises, but never gives anything.

author: Jane Austen

author: Maria Montessori

author: Frank Lloyd Wright
content: The architect should strive continually to simplify the ensemble of the rooms should then be carefully considered that comfort and utility may go hand in hand with beauty.

author: Henry James

author: Samuel Johnson

author: James Russell Lowell
content: Poetry is something to make us wiser and better, by continually revealing those types of beauty and truth, which God has set in all men's souls.

author: Boris Pasternak

author: Mark Hyman

author: Hans Urs von Balthasar

author: Bryant H. McGill
content: Courtesy is a silver lining around the dark clouds of civilization it is the best part of refinement and in many ways, an art of heroic beauty in the vast gallery of man's cruelty and baseness.

author: Charles Baudelaire

author: Rudyard Kipling

author: Karl Lagerfeld

author: Barbara Corcoran

author: David Herbert Lawrence
content: Sex and beauty are inseparable, like life and consciousness. And the intelligence which goes with sex and beauty, and arises out of sex and beauty, is intuition.

author: Amy Grant

author: John Keats

author: Franz Kafka

author: Charles Baudelaire

author: Emile Zola

author: E. M. Forster
content: Nonsense and beauty have close connections.

author: John Keats

author: Laurence J. Peter

author: David Herbert Lawrence

author: Mason Cooley

author: William Congreve

The sky is your ocean, and the crystal silence will uplift you like great gospel music, or Neil Young.

author: Xenophon

author: Alanis Morissette
content: Beauty is now defined by your bones sticking out of your decolletage. For that to be the standard is really perilous for women.

author: Andre Breton

author: Camille Paglia
content: Younger women have no problem in reconciling beauty with ambitions as a professional woman.

author: Wallace Stevens

author: Michael Franti

author: Rashida Jones
content: I pretty much borrow my entire beauty regime from my mom.

author: Tom Wolfe

author: Walter Pater

author: Walter Pater
content: What is important, then, is not that the critic should possess a correct abstract definition of beauty for the intellect, but a certain kind of temperament, the power of being deeply moved by the presence of beautiful objects.

author: Walter Pater
content: One of the most beautiful passages of Rousseau is that in the sixth book of Confessions, where he describes the awakening in him of the literary sense. Of such wisdom, the poetic passion, the desire of beauty, the love of art for its own sake, has most.

author: Geraldine Brooks

So the beauty for a writer is that you can keep doing it right into your dotage, and I hope to be able to keep doing it as long as I can get away with it, yeah.

author: Rachel Bilson

author: Rachel Bilson

content: In December 1998, I considered myself an expert on love. I was almost a year into a relationship, one that had grown more slowly than I had wished, but once it flowered it was much more stimulating than any marriage or relationship I had known.

author: Gary Numan
content: I am very old-fashioned about marriage. It is for life and I mean it. I always knew that when I met the right girl, the life I had before - being single, in a band, girls everywhere - would be over.

author: Gary Vaynerchuk
content: Brands mature over time, like a marriage. The bond you feel with your spouse is different than when you first met each other. Excitement and discovery are replaced by comfort and depth.

author: Jennifer Garner
content: I don't have this fantasy about marriage anymore. Everyone says it takes hard work. Well, it kind of does - and I'm much more pragmatic about romance than I used to be.

author: Jennifer Garner
content: The rule with marriage is the less you talk about it the better, as far as I can tell.

author: John Boehner
content: While 45 of the 50 States have either a State constitutional amendment or a statute that preserves the current definition of marriage, left-wing activist judges and officials at the local levels have struck down State laws protecting marriage.

author: John Boehner
content: And that is why marriage and family law has emphasized the importance of marriage as the foundation of family, addressing the needs of children in the most positive way.

author: Courteney Cox
content: When David Arquette and I got engaged we started therapy together. I'd heard that the first year of marriage is the hardest, so we decided to work through all that stuff early.

author: Courteney Cox
content: Is marriage for ever? I think you get married with the intention that it will be, but who knows?

author: Courteney Cox
content: It's so easy to grow apart marriage takes work.

author: Gene Simmons
content: Marriage is an institution, and you must be fully committed to it.

author: Jamie Foxx
content: I don't know if I'm built for marriage.

author: Sumner Redstone
content: Sometimes divorce is better than marriage.

author: Patti Stanger
content: I'm an advocate for gay marriage. I have more gay friends than Carter has pills.

author: Patti Stanger
content: On both 'The Bachelor' and 'The Bachelorette,' it seems like proposing marriage is equivalent to saying, 'Let's date.' Everyone knows those aren't the same things.

author: Liz Smith
content: The marriage didn't work out but the separation is great.

author: Jeb Bush
content: Traditional marriage is what should be sanctioned.

author: Sarah McLachlan
content: Coming to terms with the fact that my marriage was a failure was devastating and very difficult.

author: Sarah McLachlan
content: It's all kind of a big illusion: the white picket fence and the perfect marriage and the kids. Check that box off, check that box off, and move forward.

author: Dominic Monaghan
content: I have a lot of respect for marriage.

author: Bobby Darin
content: This marriage is no one's business but our own.

author: Tim Allen
content: In marriage, compromise nurtures the relationship.

author: Tim Allen
content: I was gone so much in my first marriage. I love the moments when I engage with my youngest daughter now. It's not my thing to sit on the ground and play tea party, but I'll do it because it's a moment that will stick with me forever.

author: Donny Osmond
content: I believe in the institution of marriage. Of course being a Mormon, we believe in eternity rather than just till death do us part. If you really try hard, if you make it work, it's blissful. But I also know a marriage that isn't working can be painful.

author: Demi Moore
content: The truth is you can have a great marriage, but there are still no guarantees.

author: Ann Romney
content: Well you know, I think a lot of us in marriage know that you play different roles at different times. And Mitt can get very intense, and I can have the ability to kind of talk him off the rails sometimes and say, 'Hey let's look at what is really important and let's do that now.'

author: Ann Romney
content: In marriage, it's always that give and take and rebalancing that we have to do in how we can help each other. But, I have been known at times by my sons, that is the name that they call me-the Mitt stabilizer.

author: Francis Picabia
content: God invented concubinage, satan marriage.

author: Hulk Hogan
content: You know, there were major problems in my marriage.

author: Helen Reddy
content: I believe wholeheartedly in marriage. I don't exclusively mean a marriage with a legal contract, but any relationship that constitutes a marriage because of the quality of their relationship.

author: Helen Reddy
content: I think that two people who decide to live together in a marriage situation, they have an obligation to make the marriage work for them.

author: Kendrick Meek
content: Studies have consistently shown that financial hardship is the biggest obstacle to heterosexual marriage, yet the Republican leadership has done precious little to help address the financial hardship faced by American families.

author: Katey Sagal
content: For me it's also - the music is equally as important. I mean I think as somebody who writes music, there just has to sort of be the marriage between both.

author: Prince William
content: We'll sort of get over the marriage first and then maybe look at the kids. But obviously we want a family so we'll have to start thinking about that.

author: William O. Douglas
content: Marriage is a coming together for better or for worse, hopefully enduring, and intimate to the degree of being sacred.

author: Robert Downey, Jr.
content: But I will agree that I think that things happen with people in relationships, that you might have been able to enjoy Morocco, say, if you weren't getting out of a bad marriage. You know what I mean?

author: Rachael Ray
content: I don't think young men or women should feel pressured into marriage. You shouldn't marry anyone, in my opinion, who you have to try hard for.

author: Cynthia Nixon
content: I've always been wary of marriage.

author: Ayelet Waldman
content: During the periods in my marriage when I chose to stay home with my kids rather than work as an attorney, it caused me no end of anxiety. Despite the fact that I knew I was contributing to our family by caring for our children, I still felt that my worth was less because I wasn't earning.

author: Mike Huckabee
content: My kids have moved more in their twenties, you know, than my parents have moved in nearly 40-something years of marriage before they died. So there's a part of me that laments what we have lost, and that is a sense of community.

author: Ginnifer Goodwin
content: I am much more open to plural marriage than I was before, and I now support it in certain situations. I do believe it is right for some people. But our example in America today is gross abuse - I can't support it in fundamentalist compounds.

author: Stockwell Day
content: Provincial governments in Canada have terminated the positions of marriage commissioners who have, for personal religious convictions, not performed same sex marriages. It has happened in Saskatchewan.

author: Stockwell Day
content: Bishop Frederick Henry of Calgary is facing at least two official objections to his public statements along with expensive hearings before the Alberta Human Rights Commission for expressing his biblical views on same sex marriage.

author: Stockwell Day
content: Our national media refuses to report that even the Supreme Court did not say marriage was a human right in all cases nor did it say that the heterosexual definition violated anyone's right or that the heterosexual definition of marriage was unconstitutional.

author: Stockwell Day
content: Marriage commissioners who choose not to marry homosexuals are being fired. A Knights of Columbus chapter in British Columbia is in court because it chooses not allow a lesbian group to use its facility for marriage ceremonies. The list goes on.

author: Stockwell Day
content: My parents did not have a perfect marriage. It was pretty good, but it was not perfect. My marriage is not perfect. My wife is, but I happen to be imperfect. However, that does not discount the fact that the definition of marriage must be defended and protected.

author: Portia de Rossi
content: I have to be asked, I guess, but I love the idea of marriage. I think it's beautiful. I'm such a romantic, and I always have been.

author: Edmond About
content: Marriage, in life, is like a duel in the midst of a battle.

author: Adam Levine
content: There are many things that keep me from getting married. But there will be a time when marriage makes sense to me.

author: Rupert Everett
content: I think marriage is ghastly.

author: Kellan Lutz
content: I love the idea of marriage. I definitely want marriage and little Kellans running around.

author: Michelle Williams
content: I don't know what my version of a relationship or marriage is yet, because the typical model seems a little broken to me.

author: Phil Collins
content: In 1977 we played America and Europe three times, and Japan - my marriage suffered as a result. My then wife took the kids to Canada to be near her parents.

author: Sherri Shepherd
content: I'd love to have First Lady Michelle Obama over and ask, 'How do you make your marriage work?' I think the president is sexy as all get-out, but he has got to get on her nerves some kind of way. He's this wonderful, powerful man, but she sees him leaving his socks on the floor.

author: Jason Mraz
content: Well, my view before was a Western view, and I certainly understand marriage equality and civil rights, equal rights for all, but having visited developing nations and some of the poorest nations in the world, I realize how deep it goes and how much work really needs to be done to create equality for all.

author: Ringo Starr
content: And in a marriage you can't TRY and be married. You're married or you're not married... as far as I'm concerned.

author: Cat Deeley
content: Success is hard in general for most women. We now have such busy lives, and we're told we can do everything - you know, we can have the relationship and the marriage and the kids and the career.

author: Lynn Redgrave
content: There were times after my marriage ended where, you know, I really felt like I was at the bottom of a mountain, there was a great big, fog up there, and I'm never going to cross to the other side.

author: Lynn Redgrave
content: I don't want marriage. You know why? Because I did that. I did it for 32 years.

author: Jeremy Taylor
content: Marriage is the mother of the world. It preserves kingdoms, and fills cities and churches, and heaven itself.

author: George Osborne
content: I support gay marriage. I support gay marriage because I believe Conservatives support the institutions of commitment.

author: Peter De Vries
content: The value of marriage is not that adults produce children but that children produce adults.

author: Alveda King
content: It is statistically proven that the strongest institution that guarantees procreation and continuity of the generations is marriage between one man and one woman. We don't want genocide. We don't want to destroy the sacred institution of marriage.

author: Alveda King
content: People need jobs, people need happy and successful lives there should be marriage between one man and one woman, there should the value of person from conception until natural death.

author: Rick Santorum
content: I'm always told that what I say is controversial. Why is it controversial? Because I speak from a tradition that has now fallen out of favor with the dominant media in this country. And so when I say things like marriage should be between one man and one woman, I'm called a bigot.

author: Seth Rogen
content: Marriage can be expensive, and if I lose millions then it'll be the best millions I've spent.

author: Jenny Eclair
content: I don't do marriage. I think it's incredibly naff. And I don't like vulgar displays of ostentation.

author: Ethan Hawke
content: The biggest problem in my life is trying to be the kind of man that I want to be, the father that I want to be, and how to process the failure of my marriage.

author: Sacha Guitry
content: The secret of a good marriage is forgiving your partner for marrying you in the first place.

author: Esther Williams
content: Marriage to Fernando offered shelter and security, but the shackle was the price I'd pay.

author: Albert Brooks
content: I had a very wise person tell me that he thinks marriage, when you're younger, you keep thinking you can fix things. That's what people do. And you can't really fix anything. It shouldn't be a massive difficult thing every day. Life's difficult enough.

author: Keith O'Brien
content: Same-sex marriage would eliminate entirely in law the basic idea of a mother and a father for every child. It would create a society which deliberately chooses to deprive a child of either a mother or a father.

author: Eva Gabor
content: Marriage is too interesting an experiment to be tried only once.

author: Bethenny Frankel
content: I've often thought if I didn't make my marriage work, I would have failed at my one true shot at happiness.

author: Bethenny Frankel
content: You have to work for everything. Marriage should not be any different.

author: Emily Blunt
content: Marriage is something that needs to be worked on every day. I don't know if I'm the one to give marital advice since I've only been married for a little over a year, but marriage is certainly easier if you are open, trusting and loving.

author: Jerry Falwell
content: Any sex outside of the marriage bond between a man and a woman is violating God's law.

author: Bob Newhart
content: I think one reason for a successful marriage is laughter. I think laughter gets you through the rough moments in a marriage.

author: Kate Adie
content: I was sent to a nice Church of England girls' school and at that time, after university, a woman was expected to become a teacher, a nurse or a missionary - prior to marriage.

author: George Will
content: Well, you know, the definition of second marriage is the triumph of hope over experience.

author: Elsa Maxwell
content: Seeing unhappiness in the marriage of friends, I was content to have chosen music and laughter as a substitute for a husband.

author: Robin Gibb
content: How do you explain the bond between man and wife? Well, for one thing, it's private. What people do in their own marriage is their own business.

author: Carol Vorderman
content: My first marriage was totally unsuitable and shouldn't have happened. It was a whirlwind, rebound thing. I was 23 or 24 - a baby.

author: Joseph Ratzinger
content: Above all, we must have great respect for these people who also suffer and who want to find their own way of correct living. On the other hand, to create a legal form of a kind of homosexual marriage, in reality, does not help these people.

author: Bianca Jagger
content: I find it disturbing that the media keeps referring to my marriage, since I got divorced in 1979. But the media never wants to let me forget.

author: Joseph Barbera
content: My marriage had been impulsive. That marriage should have been short-lived instead of the 23 years it spanned.

author: Anne Tyler
content: The Amateur Marriage grew out of the reflection that of all the opportunities to show differences in character, surely an unhappy marriage must be the richest.

author: Jeffrey Eugenides
content: Well, marriage doesn't function in the way it used to in terms of deciding our fate, but it's in our heads, and it determines a lot of our actions. Like, right now, if you think about gay marriage - and they just started having the first gay marriages in New York - it shows what a potent idea marriage remains for people.

author: Mercedes McCambridge
content: My second marriage had a lot to do with alcohol.

author: Agnes Macphail
content: It is a fact that all women contribute more to marriage than men for the most part they have to change their place of living, their method of work, a great many women today changing their occupation entirely on marriage and they must even change their name.

author: Malcolm Turnbull
content: Do the bishops seriously imagine that legalising gay marriage will result in thousands of parties to heterosexual marriages suddenly deciding to get divorced so they can marry a person of the same sex?

author: Millicent Carey McIntosh
content: There is no greater excitement than to support an intellectual wife and have her support you. Marriage is a partnership in which each inspires the other, and brings fruition to both of you.

author: Ellen Barkin
content: A successful marriage isn't necessarily one that lasts until you're dead.

author: Hugh Hefner
content: I was very influenced by the musicals and romantic comedies of the 1930s. I admired Gene Harlow and such, which probably explains why, since the end of my marriage, I've dated nothing but a succession of blondes.

author: David Boreanaz
content: I haven't been faithful to my wife. Our marriage has been tainted with my infidelities. I was irresponsible.

author: Amanda Holden
content: I should have been out there having a wild time like all the other girls my age, but I wasn't. I was going home every night to what was, initially, a very happy marriage.

author: Randall Terry
content: How long before we have, not just homosexual marriage, but homosexual unions between adult men and small boys?

author: Gary Bauer
content: Obviously, marriage is not a synonym for morality. But stable marriages and families do encourage moral behavior.

author: Gary Bauer
content: There is something wrong with our culture when the view that marriage is between one man and one woman, a view shared by half the nation, is portrayed as evidence of hatred.

author: Gary Bauer
content: If Republicans want to be seen as more compassionate, they should continue to stand proudly for the sanctify of life and marriage. And they should do so without apologizing.

author: Gary Bauer
content: Particularly black Americans, many of them, from quotes that I have seen and conversations I've had, are sort of insulted that the civil rights movement is being hijacked - the rhetoric of the civil rights movement is being hijacked for something like same sex marriage. Black Americans tend to have a higher degree of religiosity.

author: Gary Bauer
content: My argument is simple, which is, that for several thousand years in Western civilization, marriage has been the union of one man and one woman. Research is overwhelming that children need mothers and fathers.

author: Gary Bauer
content: If one is going to change the definition of marriage to be, quote, 'same sex,' then there is absolutely no valid argument constitutionally or rhetorically you can make against multiple people getting married. These are radical social changes.

author: Gary Bauer
content: Independence doesn't - doesn't equate to moderates. Millions of independents are pro-life. Millions of independents believe marriage is between a man and a woman.

author: Mark Ruffalo
content: I ran to my marriage, I was happily ready to take on marriage.

author: Eleanora Duse
content: The weaker partner in a marriage is the one who loves the most.

author: David Copperfield
content: Marriage is like a formality for me.

author: David Copperfield
content: No, I think marriage is a great thing.

author: Sarah Michelle Gellar
content: I also think it was important for me and Freddie to be able to have a lot of time to share our lives at the beginning of our marriage rather than my coming home at 9 or 10 at night from the set. Things have really worked out for the best for both of us.

author: Pope Shenouda III
content: Homosexuality is against nature. Sexual expression is permitted only within marriage, between man and woman, male and female. Anything else is an abnormality and is against nature.

author: Sandra Lee
content: I like being independent. I don't think that marriage means you're not independent, but right now I'm very comfortable, and I'm probably the happiest I've ever been. I feel solid. I feel safe.

author: Sandra Lee
content: I'm an activist for gay marriage equality and children's rights. I'm the face of Share Our Strength.

author: Darrell Royal
content: I know that the odds are against a marriage lasting 60 years.

author: Sophie Ellis Bextor
content: My parents separated when I was four. It wasn't the smoothest of divorces, but then as my mother always says, you can't have a passionate marriage without a passionate divorce.

author: Marlo Thomas
content: In the 1960s we were fighting to be recognized as equals in the marketplace, in marriage, in education and on the playing field. It was a very exciting, rebellious time.

author: David Gest
content: She got the magazine on a Wednesday morning, and on Thursday announced our marriage was over.

author: Jacques Pepin
content: After 45 years of marriage, when I have an argument with my wife, if we don't agree, we do what she wants. But, when we agree, we do what I want!

author: Al Goldstein
content: Even though marriage is doomed, if you turned it into a job you like and really work at it - it can be salvaged.

author: Al Goldstein
content: The only way marriage can work is if a man respects the woman and she is a thinking woman and he wants to work on the marriage.

author: Michelle Pfeiffer
content: Ultimately, I believe the only secret to a happy marriage is choosing the right person. Life is a series of choices, right?

author: Adam Levine
content: I'm extremely fascinated by marriage. I want to study marriage. I want to learn about it. I want to know it. I want to figure out whether or not I want to do it. I'm not just going to leap into it, because that's not good for anybody.

author: Azar Nafisi
content: This is a good time to ask apologists for the Islamic regime, who degrades Islam? Who imposes stoning, forced marriage of underage girls and flogging for not wearing the veil? Do such practices represent Iran's ancient history and culture, its ethnic and religious diversity? Its centuries of sensual and subversive poetry?

author: Kirstie Alley
content: I love marriage. I failed at marriage, but I'd rather go into anything with gusto and fail than go into it half-assed.

author: Dianne Feinstein
content: For the life of me, I don't understand what honest motive there is in putting this in front of this body to philosophically debate marriage on a constitutional amendment that is not going to happen, and which is enormously divisive in all of our communities.

author: Tom Petty
content: What I've learned about marriage: You need to have each other's back you have to be a kind of team going through life.

author: Paul Getty
content: A marriage contract to me is as binding as any in business, and I have always believed in sticking to an agreement.

author: Paul Getty
content: I have never been given to envy - save for the envy I feel toward those people who have the ability to make a marriage work and endure happily.

author: Michele Bachmann
content: I do support a constitutional amendment on marriage between a man and a woman, but I would not be going into the states to overturn their state law.

author: Garrett Hedlund
content: It's funny - I read that women look to chiseled-faced guys for one-night stands, and to round-faced guys for marriage. When I'm rounder in the face, I like to say, 'This is my long-term look.' Or 'This is my wife-and-kids look right here.'

author: Cathy Freeman
content: I'm not a marriage expert, quite clearly.

author: Roger Stone
content: You can't wake up one day and say 'I'm for gay marriage,' and wake up the next day and say 'I'm against it.' Wake up one day and say, 'I'm pro-choice,' and the next day wake up and say, 'I'm pro-life.' There's no credibility there.

author: Penelope Cruz
content: I don't know if I believe in marriage. I believe in family, love and children.

author: Mika Brzezinski
content: I realize that of all people, I am no expert on parenting or marriage.

author: Mika Brzezinski
content: I suffered from a mild case of postpartum depression after my second child and the physical challenge of maintaining an overnight shift at CBS, a marriage, and two in diapers made the symptoms worse and everyone in the house paid the price.

author: Mira Nair
content: Marriage of attraction is a gamble anyway, so you might as well marry into a family that is similar to your own, and make that much less of an adjustment. But the 'love marriage', as it is called, is equally common in India now. But it would be interesting to do a comparison of what would work better. Marriage is hard work, and it is a gamble.

author: Paul Thomas Anderson
content: My older sister was at the cusp of new wave, and I had older brothers from my father's first marriage who were rock 'n' roll guys, so I was exposed to a lot of popular culture.

author: Greta Scacchi
content: I'm a heathen when it comes to marriage.

author: Mary Douglas
content: Since 1970, relationships can be more volatile, jobs more ephemeral, geographical mobility more intensified, stability of marriage weaker.

author: Frank Bruno
content: I still believe in marriage.

author: George Carey
content: If someone talks about union, fidelity, a monogamous relationship, love, blessing I would say it sounds like marriage to me. And blessing, you see, I think is undermining our sacrament of marriage.

author: Guy de Maupassant
content: It is better to be unhappy in love than unhappy in marriage, but some people manage to be both.

author: Dora Russell
content: Marriage, laws, the police, armies and navies are the mark of human incompetence.

author: NeNe Leakes
content: My first marriage was very traditional, in the church, and then we left the church and went to the reception hall. So this time, I'd like to go fairy tale all the way.

author: Candace Bushnell
content: My parents had a great marriage. Interestingly, it made it harder for me in relationships because I knew what a good relationship looked like.

author: Teri Garr
content: I refused David Letterman's proposal of marriage for obvious reasons, but thanks for asking.

author: Peter De Vries
content: Who of us is mature enough for offspring before the offspring themselves arrive? The value of marriage is not that adults produce children but that children produce adults.

author: Emily Procter
content: I am hoping this is my year to have children. I understand that I am possibly more European in my views of marriage. I am not going to say I'm not going to get married, but it's not my priority.

author: Larry Elder
content: My mom and my dad were married 56 years, and the fact that I reconciled with my dad I think made their marriage a little bit better as well.

author: Boris Pasternak
content: Love is not weakness. It is strong. Only the sacrament of marriage can contain it.

author: Anne Heche
content: I believe I went through a divorce. My relationship with Ellen is no less significant as a marriage than my relationship to Coley.

author: Rick Santorum
content: Isn't that the ultimate homeland security, standing up and defending marriage?

author: Rick Santorum
content: Every society in the history of man has upheld the institution of marriage as a bond between a man and a woman. Why? Because society is based on one thing: that society is based on the future of the society. And that's what? Children. Monogamous relationships.

author: Rick Santorum
content: The Obama administration now has regulations that tells them that they can no longer promote marriage to these young girls. They can no longer promote marriage as a way of avoiding poverty and bad choices that they make in their life. They can no longer even teach abstinence education. They have to be neutral with respect to how people behave.

author: James McGreevey
content: You know for many elected officials they all started in the same place. You know marriage is between a man and a woman, but they understand that they are moving inevitably, catching up to the American public.

author: James McGreevey
content: Civil union is less than marriage. Marriage is a sacred and valued institution and ought to be afforded equal protection.

author: Gail Porter
content: My parents' marriage was very rocky. They were always arguing. When they split up when I was in my 20s, my brother and I were both delighted because we knew they weren't good for each other.

author: Lafcadio Hearn
content: Of course, the simple explanation of the fact is that marriage is the most important act of man's life in Europe or America, and that everything depends upon it.

author: Lafcadio Hearn
content: French novels generally treat of the relations of women to the world and to lovers, after marriage consequently there is a great deal in French novels about adultery, about improper relations between the sexes, about many things which the English public would not allow.

author: Jamie Lee Curtis
content: My marriage? Up to now everything's okay. But it's a real marriage - imperfect and very difficult. It's all about people evolving somewhat simultaneously through their lives. I think we've emotionally evolved.

author: Jamie Lee Curtis
content: My mother and stepfather were married 43 years, so I have watched a long marriage. I feel like I had a very good role model for that. And, you know, it's just a number.

author: Anthony Holden
content: I decided he'd changed so much that a whole new book was required and that book actually I can say so was the first to say that the marriage was in trouble and the Prince didn't like at all and my book was being serialized in the Sunday Times over five weeks.

author: Sophie Ellis-Bextor
content: My parents separated when I was four. It wasn't the smoothest of divorces, but then as my mother always says, 'You can't have a passionate marriage without a passionate divorce.'

author: Katharine McPhee
content: Marriage gives you a new respect for a person.

author: Seamus Heaney
content: Whether it be a matter of personal relations within a marriage or political initiatives within a peace process, there is no sure-fire do-it-yourself kit.

author: Keith O'Brien
content: Redefining marriage will have huge implications for what is taught in our schools, and for wider society. It will redefine society since the institution of marriage is one of the fundamental building blocks of society. The repercussions of enacting same-sex marriage into law will be immense.

author: Lara Flynn Boyle
content: I think the institution of marriage is a great idea, but for me it's just an idea.

author: Phyllis McGinley
content: Marriage was all a woman's idea and for man's acceptance of the pretty yoke, it becomes us to be grateful.

author: Maria Callas
content: I prepare myself for rehearsals like I would for marriage.

author: Angela Carter
content: What is marriage but prostitution to one man instead of many?

author: LeAnn Rimes
content: My relationship with Dean was great, but ultimately it wasn't a fulfilling marriage for either of us.

author: Lisa Bonet
content: My mother, brave woman, lost her whole family when she decided to marry a black man in the '60s. When the marriage fell apart, she had to come back to her family.

author: Paul Martin
content: I rise today in support of Bill C-38, the Civil Marriage Act. I rise in support of a Canada in which liberties are safeguarded, rights are protected and the people of this land are treated as equals under the law.

author: Germaine Greer
content: Marriage made more sense when it was indissoluble. It's the woman trying to cope with the strains of a one-parent family who will suffer most from the relaxation of the divorce laws.

author: Giuliana Rancic
content: I never thought my marriage could be stronger, or I could be closer to Bill. We prayed on our own, but now we prayed together and you'll never know how much that means until you do it.

author: Sean Penn
content: Marriage ain't easy, but it's great most of the time.

author: Alastair Campbell
content: To me, marriage is partly a religious thing and I'm not religious.

author: Lisa Marie Presley
content: I'm not eager to jump into marriage again. I'm in the corner right now, wearing my dunce cap. That area is obviously a nightmare.

author: Alain de Botton
content: What is fascinating about marriage is why anyone wants to get married.

author: Harold Nicolson
content: The great secret of a successful marriage is to treat all disasters as incidents and none of the incidents as disasters.

author: Nancy Grace
content: I went nearly 30 years without being able to really seriously entertain marriage or a family. In fact, the word 'marriage' would actually give me a shake when it was brought up.

author: Debra Messing
content: I think the institute of marriage is a noble thing. The idea of a partner for life is incredibly romantic. But now we're living to 100. A hundred years ago people were dying at age 37. Til death do us part was a much different deal.

author: Sadie Frost
content: I never thought I'd spend all my life with Gary. I suppose I was quite cynical about marriage. But with Jude, I knew right from the beginning: there was an electricity I'd never felt before. It was so easy, we talked for hours. It was a relief, really.

author: Norman Lear
content: I guess because the shows were activist in their own way - the marriage of my public activism and my career activism, you know - people understand me very well. They also understand there's a very strong bipartisan part in all of this.

author: Michael Ian Black
content: I honestly believe you can never tell if a relationship is going to last. In my own marriage, which is going on 14 years, I don't think of it as 'I'm going to be with this person forever.' Instead, I think of more like, 'I'll probably be with this person for the next six weeks. Then I'll re-evaluate.'

author: Gerrit Smith
content: The Southern slave would obey God in respect to marriage, and also to the reading and studying of His word. But this, as we have seen, is forbidden him.

author: Jhumpa Lahiri
content: I don't know why, but the older I get the more interested I get in my parents' marriage. And it's interesting to be married yourself, too, because there is an inevitable comparison.

author: Jhumpa Lahiri
content: My parents had an arranged marriage, as did so many other people when I was growing up. My father came and had a life in the United States one way and my mother had a different one, and I was very aware of those things. I continue to wonder about it, and I will continue to write about it.

author: Sade Adu
content: I am fairly classless because it is very difficult to class someone who comes from a mixed marriage.

author: Archie Panjabi
content: There is a big misconception about arranged marriage. Yes, it can mean that you meet someone and then have to marry them, but this was my mother saying, 'I'm going to introduce you to so-and-so - If you don't like them, fair enough.'

author: Les Dawson
content: Marriage is an institution and that's where a couple finish up.

author: Rutherford B. Hayes
content: No person connected with me by blood or marriage will be appointed to office.

author: David Boreanaz
content: In a sacred ground like marriage, you find yourself out of it at certain times for reasons unknown that can be destructive. There could be a demon that kind of comes out and overtakes you.

author: Ashley Judd
content: I think that, as with marriage, you just know when it's time to have kids.

author: Burt Reynolds
content: Marriage is about the most expensive way for the average man to get laundry done.

author: Florence King
content: American couples have gone to such lengths to avoid the interference of in-laws that they have to pay marriage counselors to interfere between them.

author: Jeff Miller
content: The marriage of a man and woman is the most enduring human institution, honored in all cultures and by every religious faith. It's in this institution that children are meant to be nurtured. We know this after thousands of years of human experience.

author: Jack Kingston
content: Marriage is sacred and protected and has nothing to do with violating our civil rights.

author: Jack Kingston
content: If we change the definition of marriage to be more inclusive, then it is logical to argue that we should broaden the definition so that won't exclude anyone.

author: Jack Kingston
content: But whether a couple is a man and a woman has everything to do with the meaning of marriage.

author: Jack Kingston
content: Marriage encourages the men and women who together create life to unite in a bond for the protection of children.

author: Jack Kingston
content: Marriage cannot be severed from its cultural, religious and natural roots without weakening the good influence of society.

author: Jack Kingston
content: So far, 44 States, or 88 percent of the States, have enacted laws providing that marriage shall consist of a union between a man and a woman. Only 75 percent of the States are required to approve a constitutional amendment.

author: Mark Udall
content: When I talk about the importance of the institution of marriage, I think of the commitment and the significance of standing in front of those closest to you and promising fidelity to your partner 'til death do you part.'

author: Mark Udall
content: I support allowing gay couples to marry because of - not in spite of - my values. And many of those values are the same ones deeply held by those who do not believe in gay marriage.

author: Nick Lachey
content: Marriage is a team effort. Both of us share that philosophy.

author: Anthony Weiner
content: Sooner or later they are going to live in a New York City where gay marriage is not only legal, but it's common and they don't even notice.

author: Anthony Weiner
content: I've exchanged messages and photos of an explicit nature with about six women over the last three years. For the most part, these communications took place before my marriage, though some have sadly took place after. To be clear, I have never met any of these women or had physical relationships at any time.

author: Charles Eastman
content: There was no religious ceremony connected with marriage among us, while on the other hand the relation between man and woman was regarded as in itself mysterious and holy.

author: Carol Ann Duffy
content: If I felt, in the event of a royal wedding, inspired to write about people coming together in marriage or civil partnership, I would just be grateful to have an idea for the poem. And if I didn't, I'd ignore it.

author: Linda McCartney
content: But I wanted marriage for myself. I was not calculating about it. I wish I was more calculating.

author: Linda McCartney
content: I wasn't looking for another marriage. I had been married before. He is a nice man - a geologist, an Ernest Hemingway type. But Paul and I married because of convention.

author: Courtney Thorne Smith
content: If it's not working before you get married, marriage isn't going to fix it.

author: Jimmy Carr
content: I was a Christian. I didn't want to have sex before marriage, I was a bit uptight and not very self-confident. I was a virgin until I was 26.

author: Bede Griffiths
content: I think the Mother is gradually revealing itself to me and taking over. But it is not the Mother alone. It is the Mother and the Father, the male and the female, sort of gradually having their marriage.

author: Maggie Gallagher
content: When a marriage culture fails, sexual desire no longer unites instead it fragments.

author: Maggie Gallagher
content: Same-sex marriage is not the future.

author: Maggie Gallagher
content: Europe, which gave us the idea of same-sex marriage, is a dying society, with birthrates 50 percent below replacement.

author: Nigel Lythgoe
content: Since I've been in the U.S. I've lost the back of my heart, 15 ft. of intestine and my marriage - and God, I miss my intestine.

author: Madeleine Stowe
content: Yes, the marriage proposal was shot. Michael excluded the dialogue from the final edit.

author: Aisha Tyler
content: Marriage isn't a carnival ride.

author: Lynn Johnston
content: I was just so lucky to have a wonderful life after a tough marriage.

author: Mary Wesley
content: Each marriage has to be judged separately, and we never know what's going on in another person's marriage.

author: Mary Wesley
content: My father was a soldier and my mother was a great mover. She once counted up how many places she had lived in during the first 25 years of her marriage and it came to 20.

author: Robin Morgan
content: We can't destroy the inequities between men and women until we destroy marriage.

author: Augusten Burroughs
content: Marriage is overdone. As long as there are people, people are going to find it interesting.

author: Joe Scarborough
content: Do not miss your children's childhood. Do not be away 200 nights a year as I was. Do not put strains on your marriage or family.

author: Michael Strahan
content: I definitely believe in marriage.

author: Carson Daly
content: I think long-lasting, healthy relationships are more important than the idea of marriage. At the root of every successful marriage is a strong partnership.

author: Christopher Hampton
content: To seduce a woman famous for strict morals, religious fervor and the happiness of her marriage: what could possibly be more prestigious?

author: Ian Mckellen
content: It's only fair that stable gay relationships of long standing should have the same rights and responsibilities as married couples. I know the image of gay marriage is to some people horrific and ludicrous.

author: Joan Cusack
content: It's nice to be able to work I'd love to be able to do another TV show I could do in Chicago so I could live and work in the same place. It's hard being a parent and being in a good marriage, and it all takes a lot of work, but if you're not there you can't do any of it.

author: Todd Akin
content: I oppose any attempt to grant homosexual unions the same legal privileges that civil government affords to traditional marriage and family life.

author: Ernest Istook
content: We need uniform protection of traditional marriage. You can't have different definitions on something as fundamental as marriage. The Marriage Protection Amendment is the only solution to this problem.

author: Ernest Istook
content: Out of control judicial activism threatens traditional marriage in America.

author: Sally Kirkland
content: I have married thriteen couples. I'm about to do a marriage next month.

author: Michele Bachmann
content: I think it's best if there's an amendment that goes on the ballot where the people can weigh in. Every time this issue has gone on the ballot, the people have voted to retain the traditional definition of marriage as recently as California in 2008.

author: Michele Bachmann
content: I think you may see again a rise at the federal government level for a - a call for the federal constitutional amendment, because people want to make sure that this definition of marriage remains secure, because after all, the family is the fundamental unit of government.

author: Thomas Haden Church
content: Their lives have been largely defined by failure and you would think the prospect of marriage, which is supposed to be bountiful and hopeful, it's just really another kind of tangential thing in his life.

author: David Limbaugh
content: Obama's position on marriage is brazenly cynical.

author: James Denton
content: The biggest surprise about our marriage is that Erin was out there.

author: Amanda Bynes
content: I say I never wanna get married. I feel trapped with the idea of marriage. How can you really be with somebody forever? I'd get bored! As I get older, I don't settle. I'd rather tell somebody 'This is what I want - take it or leave it.'

author: Karl Pilkington
content: To be honest, marriage doesn't scare me and that, it's just once you've been together for so long, if you haven't got any kids it's just a big expensive day out for everyone else to enjoy, isn't it?

author: Stacy Keibler
content: I'm not really interested in thinking about marriage or kids at all.

author: Lara Stone
content: Marriage takes work - it doesn't just happen.

author: Julie Christie
content: I've never quite understood why people marry marriage is just an invented structure.

author: Rose McGowan
content: I think gay marriage should be the national law.

author: Princess Margaret
content: I would like it to be known that I have decided not to marry Group Capt. Peter Townsend. Mindful of the church's teaching that Christian marriage is indissoluble, and conscious of my duty to the Commonwealth, I have resolved to put these considerations before any others.

author: Raquel Welch
content: We all have a childhood dream that when there is love, everything goes like silk, but the reality is that marriage requires a lot of compromise.

author: Susan Faludi
content: A lot of people seem to want to make the institution of marriage substitute for a real relationship.

author: Jenna Fischer
content: You never go into a marriage expecting to get divorced. You go into a marriage expecting it's going to last forever, and you have a lot of ways you dream about the future. You have all these expectations, and then you have to adjust those expectations, and it can be a very unnerving, confusing time.

author: Emily Watson
content: I don't know what makes a marriage work. My husband and I don't have it right at all it's very tough on him. From the outside it looks like it's all about me - I have a glorious career and he doesn't.

author: Kyra Sedgwick
content: After 14 years, it better be a real marriage, you know? We do have a great time together. We are really lucky.

author: Ricky Schroder
content: There are going to be peaks and valleys in everything - in your marriage, in your job, in your life. So just enjoy the peaks and ride out the valleys. Just try not to do anything too rash.

author: Timbaland
content: Good production is like a beautiful marriage. It makes a happy home.

author: Randy Neugebauer
content: Mr. Speaker, I rise today in support of the definition of a marriage as between one man and one woman.

author: Randy Neugebauer
content: Thousands of years and many civilizations have defined a marriage as the union between one man and one woman. With few exceptions, those civilizations that did not follow that perished.

author: Randy Neugebauer
content: Forty-five States, as the gentleman just said, have determined by people that were elected by the people of that State that marriage is the definition of one man and one woman.

author: Utada Hikaru
content: I figure no matter how old you are, it's always going to be your first marriage and no life experience is going to make you a better judge of who you should marry.

author: Max Frisch
content: Either marriage is a destiny, I believe, or there is no sense in it at all, it's a piece of humbug.

author: Kitty Kelley
content: Gay marriage has jumped out of the closet on to the front page. Everyone from the president of the U.S. to retired four-star general Colin Powell is embracing the issue, now supported by most Americans. Still, a few people, like former First Lady Laura Bush appear to be conflicted.

author: Rod Parsley
content: It was the courts, of course, that took away prayer from our schools, that took away Bible reading from our schools. It's the courts that gave us same-sex marriage. So it is quite a battlefield, and the Supreme Court is the highest court in the land.

author: Russ Feingold
content: I was one of 14 senators to vote against the Defense of Marriage Act. I thought it was a harsh and unnecessary thing to do to people across this country who care enough about each other to want to be married.

author: Sam Brownback
content: At my core, what I think we need to do is to get the basics right again. We need to rebuild our family structure, stay away from redefining marriage, and stand by marriage as a union between a man and a woman.

author: Sam Brownback
content: I believe in the sanctity of marriage.

author: Andrew Sullivan
content: My own early crusade for same-sex marriage, for example, is now mainstream gay politics. It wasn't when I started.

author: Andrew Sullivan
content: When I first started talking about gay marriage, most people in the gay community looked at me as if I was insane or possibly a fascist reactionary.

author: Kathy Mattea
content: So I really did stop and change what I saw I was about, and really try to put that principle into play as the center of everything - my friendships, my marriage, my career, my family, my way of being in the world. And that changed everything for me.

author: Jane Asher
content: People ask what the secret of a happy marriage is. If there is one, it's 'don't talk about it.'

author: Ricky Skaggs
content: I look back to when I got divorced in the late 1970s. When that happened, I was so broken up. After that, I decided to seek God for my life and my next marriage.

author: John Mahoney
content: I took the fear of marriage from my parents' relationship, because I didn't want to end up in a relationship like that, whereas my brothers and sisters learnt a lesson from it and made sure they didn't carry it on into their own marriages.

author: Marla Maples
content: I don't think he cheated on me. During the marriage, I think he was there.

author: Marla Maples
content: I was made to believe there was a plan in place for ending Donald's previous marriage. I pulled away because I wanted to allow him the time to deal with his wife.

author: Maria Monk
content: My parents were both from Scotland, but had been resident in Lower Canada some time before their marriage, which took place in Montreal and in that city I spent most of my life.

author: James Ellroy
content: I have a very intense marriage.

author: Lisa Guerrero
content: I'm looking forward to talking to Bill Parcells, too, and to seeing how that marriage with Jerry Jones goes.

author: Judy Biggert
content: Let me first state that I believe that marriage is a sacred union between one man and one woman.

author: Judy Biggert
content: Second, marriage is an issue that our Founding Fathers wisely left to the states.

author: Toni Braxton
content: In a broken marriage, it can be challenging and tough to get that work/life balance. I love performing but I also love being a mum, and I hate having to choose between them.

author: Max Schmeling
content: I had a happy marriage and a nice wife. I accomplished everything you can. What more can you want?

author: Connie Sellecca
content: I went through a long period of time in that marriage when I didn't believe anything was my fault. I had to face what my part was, and only because of that difficult work was I able to trust a man again.

author: Corrine Brown
content: I do not support a constitutional amendment to prohibit gay marriage.

author: Corrine Brown
content: Marriage has historically been in the domain of the States to regulate.

author: Jim Talent
content: I've always believed the two best anti-poverty programs are work and marriage.

author: Jim Talent
content: The old welfare system was hurting people by discouraging work and marriage. Welfare reform, and now this legislation, will build on the understanding that work and strong families are the foundation upon which we build our future.

author: Jenna Elfman
content: I think that marriage is an amazing institution and should be preserved, and you can have great marriages, and you must because sharing your life with someone is like the greatest thing. And I loved being able to set a good example for that on television.

author: Dax Shepard
content: I think I'm a combination of very simple pleasures and the fact I've read a lot of books. I don't think it's a binary opposition across the board in humans and I think I'm an example that it's not. I'm hosting gay marriage rallies and I have tons of guns at home. There's a lot of middle ground in the world and I'm one of those people.

author: Rachel Hunter
content: Men act out like they're horrified by marriage, but when they find the woman of their dreams, they love it.

author: Thomas Love Peacock
content: Marriage may often be a stormy lake, but celibacy is almost always a muddy horse pond.

author: Bernadette Peters
content: I feel strongly for gay marriage to be accepted.

author: Todd Tiahrt
content: Next month, I will celebrate my 30th anniversary of marriage with my beautiful bride, Vicki. Our marriage has been a blessing. I have gained even more respect for the institution over the past 3 decades and will defend it against attack.

author: Julio Iglesias
content: I listen to the people. That was a big reason for my life, maybe the main reason, I'm singing because I love it when people say to me, 'Thank you.' I thank them. It's a marriage.

author: Paul Begala
content: I mean, for all of his faults and the troubles in his marriage, Bill Clinton is still married to a girl he met in the library 25 years ago at school. Can we say that about many of our other leaders today in America, including on the right wing?

author: Nick Lampson
content: Today, I will vote in support of the Marriage Protection Amendment. I shall do so because like President Bush, I strongly believe that marriage should be between a man and a woman.

author: Harold Ford
content: I am for gay marriage. Or same-sex marriage. I don't want to say it the wrong way. I think people are sensitive to it. I have been painted as being this right-wing zealot on choice. Nothing could be further from the truth.

author: Margaret Cavendish
content: Marriage is the grave or tomb of wit.

author: James Lafferty
content: Although we hardly see each other off the set, Joy and I get along well when we do. As far as the marriage between Nathan and Haley, I think they are young and will see the reality of the situation eventually.

author: James Lafferty
content: The whole Haley-Nathan marriage deal was a pretty good twist huh? I hope we got all of you with it. That particular story line even suprised me when I read it, it's a good one and it'll provide for some good stories to come.

author: Richard G. Scott
content: There are powerful emotions that bring two people together in wonderful harmony in a marriage. Satan knows this, and would tempt you to try these emotions outside of marriage. Do not stir emotions meant to be used only in marriage.

author: Cass Sunstein
content: I think that every state in the union should recognize same-sex marriage.

author: Ken Calvert
content: We can practice tolerance while still holding true to cultural values that protect the institution of marriage as a union between only a man and a woman.

author: Sharon Gless
content: I think there are some people in life who are not marriage material and Chris is one of them.

author: Meg Ryan
content: It was not a healthy marriage for long time. It was never about another man, it was about what my and Dennis's relationship could not sustain.

author: Mickey Rooney
content: I'm the only man in the world with a marriage licence made out to whom it may concern.

author: David Steinberg
content: I used to have a theory actually that, if you've had a good childhood, a good marriage and a little bit of money in the bank, you're going to make a lousy comedian.

author: Gene Robinson
content: Stability is why society has an interest in marriage.

author: Gene Robinson
content: The state's interest in marriage is stability. Generally speaking, polygamy does not work for stability. Inherent in the whole polygamous movement is a deep and abiding misogyny and denigration of women. So polygamy is objectionable on lots of grounds.

author: George Gobel
content: College is a place to keep warm between high school and an early marriage.

author: Timothy Murphy
content: Instead, I think over the years we have cut the strength of marriage and relationships by the law and weakened the institution. We have tried to deal with relationships with no-fault divorce, with child custody, with so many other avenues and it has not helped.

author: Masaharu Morimoto
content: Culture and tradition have to change little by little. So 'new' means a little twist, a marriage of Japanese technique with French ingredients. My technique. Indian food, Korean food I put Italian mozzarella cheese with sashimi. I don't think 'new new new.' I'm not a genius. A little twist.

author: Ali Larter
content: But to sustain a marriage for 50 years, you have to get real a little bit and find someone who is understanding and who you can grow with. My mom always says, 'Marry the man who loves you a millimeter more.'

author: Anita Ekberg
content: The most important thing for a good marriage is to learn how to argue peaceably.

author: Coretta Scott King
content: Mama and Daddy King represent the best in manhood and womanhood, the best in a marriage, the kind of people we are trying to become.

author: Pete Coors
content: I'm a little skeptical about using the Constitution this way, but I also believe marriage is between a man and a woman and that the courts shouldn't legislate this matter.

author: Chris Kyle
content: You're not just going out there, maybe sacrificing your own life. There's also sacrifices still going on at home. You can serve in the military and have a good marriage, but you just need to be aware of it so you can take those steps to take care of it.

author: Jennifer Jason Leigh
content: I'd love to have children, and I think marriage is great, I really do.

author: Gavin MacLeod
content: It's very trying on a marriage when you're doing a one hour show, week after week after week. You don't have enough time for people that maybe you should have top priority.

author: Julie Benz
content: To us marriage is first, everything else is second.

author: Alan Autry
content: I do not believe that defending traditional marriage between one man and one woman excludes anybody or usurps anybody's civil rights and denies anybody their civil rights.

author: H. G. Bissinger
content: If you leave your wife and you don't ever contact her again, that says something about how you felt about the marriage.

author: Burt Lancaster
content: I found marriage somewhat stifling. I don't know that I am the kind of man who ought to be married.

author: Alfred Russel Wallace
content: What we need are not prohibitory marriage laws, but a reformed society, an educated public opinion which will teach individual duty in these matters.

author: John Krasinski
content: I know I'm guilty of and I think a lot of people are guilty of sort of getting starry-eyed with love and sort of looking over the bad things and keep going and you don't really prepare for how much work marriage really is.

author: Jesse Helms
content: That is why I fought against abortion and that is why if I were still in the Senate I would be doing everything I could to defend the sanctity of marriage.

author: Jimmy Swaggart
content: I'm knocking our pitiful, pathetic lawmakers. And I thank God that President Bush has stated, we need a Constitutional amendment that states that marriage is between a man and a woman.

author: Regina King
content: I know in my own marriage I stayed in it to provide my son with what I thought was a stable background and to give him what I thought was the family life a child should have with two parents. But that isn't always the best way, and it took me taking my son to therapy after the divorce to really see it.

author: Adam Rickitt
content: I think church and state should remain entirely separate at all costs, and that the decision of religious marriage should be of each faith to debate and decide free of political influence.

author: Kelly Preston
content: I have a wonderful marriage and two great kids.

author: Anne Stevenson
content: I did know Ted Hughes and I partly wrote the book to explain to myself and others the complexities of a marriage that was for six years wonderfully productive of poetry and then ended in tragedy.

author: Rachel Griffiths
content: I found it an interesting portrait of a marriage in exploring notions of how one partner supports the other, whilst not jeopardizing the greater good - which is the family.

author: Robert Kirkman
content: I know there are a lot of readers that think I've got a very crappy marriage just because of the things going on with Rick and Lori but there's really nothing that's been like a mirror. I'm just making this stuff up.

author: Keith O'Brien
content: No Government has the moral authority to dismantle the universally understood meaning of marriage.

author: Keith O'Brien
content: The church's teaching on marriage is unequivocal, it is uniquely, the union of a man and a woman and it is wrong that governments, politicians or parliaments should seek to alter or destroy that reality.

author: Keith O'Brien
content: If marriage can be redefined so that it no longer means a man and a woman but two men or two women, why stop there? Why not allow three men or a woman and two men to constitute a marriage?

author: Keith O'Brien
content: There is no doubt that, as a society, we have become blase about the importance of marriage as a stabilising influence and less inclined to prize it as a worthwhile institution.

author: Keith O'Brien
content: Clearly, if it is sensible to hold a referendum on independence, it is crucial that we have one on marriage. It is the only way the country can move forward on this issue. Let all those who have a view on this subject place their trust in the Scottish people and let Scotland decide.

author: Brad Garrett
content: I believe it's a real tedious hostage negotiation to have a marriage be what it is.

author: Stuart Rose
content: When I got married in my twenties, I had a happy marriage and happy kids but at some point in time I let it go off the rails I let it go off the rails.

author: Erika Slezak
content: My parents had a wonderful marriage, but it was a very dependent relationship. My mother was entirely dependent on my father because that's how it was in those days.

author: Bill Shuster
content: President Bush has a record of cutting taxes, has provided a prescription drug benefit for seniors, has upheld the Second Amendment and remains committed to stopping liberal activists judges who are redefining marriage.

author: Jesse Tyler Ferguson
content: The definition of marriage cannot be disputed. It's right there in black and white and it's been the same since the start of Wikipedia.

author: Jesse Tyler Ferguson
content: Well, my personal mission statement is that we want marriage equality in all 50 states. We want it not to be a state-by-state issue. We don't want it to be something the majority is voting on. I don't think the civil rights of any minority should be in the hands of any majority.

author: Jesse Tyler Ferguson
content: As an actor, you just want to work, and then you just want to be on a show or have a job that you love, and you hope that job will last - those things have happened. To have that platform to then talk about something that is very personal to me like marriage equality, it feels like a gift. I try and really respect that voice and not abuse it.

author: Zoe Lister-Jones
content: We are very puritan in America. We still hold true to these really antiquated values, this idea of the sanctity of marriage.

author: Terry Gilliam
content: They make Spy Kids, they make Scream, they make A Scary Movie. This doesn't do that, so it could be a very bad marriage. I'm trying to keep this potential nightmare quiet because we're just finishing editing.

author: Ryan Adams
content: I routinely never discuss my marriage. It's nice to have things in my life that are totally mine.

author: Kelly Brook
content: I've always wanted to be independent and answer for myself. That probably is the part of me I would class to be feminist. I'd like to have children marriage I have a bit of an issue with.

author: Johnny Weissmuller
content: No marriage can stand up under the strain of incessant association.

author: Marisa Tomei
content: I'm not that big a fan of marriage as an institution and I don't know why women need to have children to be seen as complete human beings.

author: Gary Chapman
