content: I have been doing marriage counseling for about 15 years and I realized that what makes one person feel loved, doesn't make another person feel loved.

author: Jon Hamm
content: I have a lady, she's a great lady. I love her a lot, she loves me. We're on the same page. Whenever that day happens when we're not on the same page we'll move forward with it. We're interested in having our lives be our lives right now and not a third person's vis-a-vis marriage and whatever that means.

author: Jon Hamm
content: It couldn't be a simpler answer. Marriage doesn't really mean anything to me. I feel like in many ways marriage is more for the families of the couple than for the people involved, so I don't gravitate to it.

author: David Thewlis
content: It wasn't a good idea to work on 'Naked' in the first months of a marriage. I was living apart from my wife in a flat overflowing with books I was reading for the part.

author: Michael Cunningham
content: I have no useful theories about love and marriage.

author: Menander
content: Marriage, if one will face the truth, is an evil, but a necessary evil.

author: Nadia Comaneci
content: My marriage to my husband, Bart Conner in 1996 is my proudest personal moment.

author: Donald Johanson
content: When the first fossils began to be found in eastern Africa, in the late 1950s, I thought, what a wonderful marriage this was, biology and anthropology. I was around 16 years old when I made this particular choice of academic pursuit.

author: Mary Cheney
content: I didn't know that President Bush would endorse a constitutional amendment banning same-sex marriage.

author: Mary Cheney
content: It won't take 40 years for opposition to same-sex marriage to dissipate.

author: Vera Brittain
content: I know one husband and wife who, whatever the official reasons given to the court for the break up of their marriage, were really divorced because the husband believed that nobody ought to read while he was talking and the wife that nobody ought to talk while she was reading.

author: Catherine Helen Spence
content: I had only two offers of marriage in my life, and I refused both.

author: Rory Bremner
content: I remember driving home one evening while they were reviewing the papers on the radio. One of the articles was about me separating from my wife. It's a weird thing to listen to a news report about the break-up of your marriage.

author: Michael Kinsley
content: In those days, the late 1970s, one of the leading politicians was a soon-to-be uncle by marriage of Arnold Schwarzenegger, named Ted Kennedy.

author: Dick Morris
content: No candidate can win a presidential race advocating gay marriage and opposing the military action in Iraq.

author: Dick Morris
content: Public-opinion polls show that Americans split about evenly on civil unions. But when the words 'gay marriage' are presented, they break 3-to-1 against it.

author: Michelle Shocked
content: Writing and singing does give me some kind of release from the demons of my past, it is a therapy of sorts, but to be honest, my marriage played a more important role in the acceptance of myself than performance has ever done.

author: Tim Murphy
content: More than 1.1 million taxpayers in Pennsylvania will enjoy a lower tax rate, more than 1.4 million married couples will benefit from the reduction in the marriage penalty, and more than 1.1 million parents will have the advantage of an increased child tax credit.

author: Arsenio Hall
content: I've never understood what the upside of marriage would be for me personally.

author: Arsenio Hall
content: I love being in a relationship, but marriage isn't for me.

author: Olivia Williams
content: My parents' long and happy marriage was a great ideal to live up to, but a tough one.

author: Kim Wilde
content: My parents have a wonderful marriage, for many years. But I can't commit myself for such a long time.

author: Jared Harris
content: My father was a Catholic, but my mother wasn't. She had to do that weird deal you do as a Catholic - they deign to sanction your marriage and you have to bring your children up as Catholics.

author: Kathy Valentine
content: It's very different than it use to be. I think everybody has a lot more experience in how to be in a relationship - whether it's a marriage or a significant other or a business or a friend.

author: Marge Piercy
content: Sleeping together is a euphemism for people, but tantamount to marriage with cats.

author: John Thune
content: There are more than 30 states, who either by statute or constitutional amendment, have defined marriage as being between a man and a woman.

author: Harriet Martineau
content: The sum and substance of female education in America, as in England, is training women to consider marriage as the sole object in life, and to pretend that they do not think so.

author: Ken Mehlman
content: The president strongly believes that marriage in this country ought to be between a man and a woman. He also believes it is something that ought to be decided by the people. He doesn't believe that judges ought to impose their will on the people.

author: Brigitte Nielsen
content: All I know is it destroyed my family, it destroyed my marriage to Sylvester and I will never get over it.

author: Mary Augusta Ward
content: It became plain very soon after our marriage that ours was to be a literary partnership.

author: Mary Augusta Ward
content: For after my marriage I had made various attempts to write fiction. They were clearly failures.

author: Carla Bruni
content: I thought marriage was something very quiet and very regular and very bourgeois.

author: Carla Bruni
content: Marriage is another trap. If you are someone who likes independence, it's another stamp against that. And you have to swear to fidelity.

author: Dalton Trumbo
content: A good businessman never makes a contract unless he's sure he can carry it through, yet every fool on earth is perfectly willing to sign a marriage contract without considering whether he can live up to it or not.

author: Kendrick Meek
content: It is sad that the Republican leadership is not as interested as they say they are in protecting the institution of marriage as they are in waging a campaign to divide and distract the American people from the real issues that need to be addressed.

author: Steve Winwood
content: A band is not a marriage. There are no oaths of allegiance. If you feel your life will be better served by splitting up the group, you've got to do it - but of course it does cause problems.

author: Len Goodman
content: I've never really been very good at marriage. It's one of my failures. I've tried my best, but I do realise the common denominator is me it's something I'm doing.

author: Nicole Appleton
content: Marriage is important to me and I love the idea of being married.

author: L. Ron Hubbard
content: Well I don't know that I'm okay any more than anyone else is okay, I lead a happy life and a very full one - I have a happy marriage and my kids are all cheerful, and no one is finding fault with me, personally.

author: Denise Richards
content: Heather knows why and when her marriage ended with Richie and she knows why my marriage ended with Charlie.

author: Cheech Marin
content: My marriage was breaking up, and my marriage with Chong was breaking up. I had to come back and kind of start on my own again.

author: Alan Keyes
content: It's about time we all faced up to the truth. If we accept the radical homosexual agenda, be it in the military or in marriage or in other areas of our lives, we are utterly destroying the concept of family.

author: Julie London
content: I think that's one of the most difficult things in any marriage - in order to build anything, you must be together. You can't build anything over the telephone.

author: Michael Moriarty
content: When I got political that blew our marriage out of the water. I was not the same person and I admit that.

author: June Carter Cash
content: I worked with John, but I had enough sense to walk just a little ways behind him. I could have made more records, but I wanted to have a marriage.

author: Garret Dillahunt
content: But the fact that same-sex marriage is still an issue is insane. Thinking love knows a sex is ridiculous.

author: Roger Wicker
content: Legislation to create a new 10 percent tax bracket, reduce the marriage penalty, cut the tax rate on dividends and capital gains, and increase the child tax credit have been essential elements in this economic expansion.

author: Manny Pacquiao
content: I only gave out my opinion that same sex marriage is against the law of God.

author: Jerry O'Connell
content: I highly suggest marriage to all my friends who are dating.

author: Indra Nooyi
content: I grew up in a Hindu household but went to a Roman Catholic school. I grew up with a mother who said, 'I'll arrange a marriage for you at 18,' but she also said that we could achieve anything we put our minds to an encourage us to dream of becoming prime minister or president.

author: Jeremy Sisto
content: You can't have a happy family if you don't have a happy marriage.

author: Jeremy Sisto
content: There's not a lot of room anymore for what I call 'made-up' drama. The drama comes from real places now - marriage takes work and focus, the kid stuff takes patience and commitment. And if you don't grow as people and as a couple, within all of that, then you've got some real drama.

author: Joey Santiago
content: It's the best marriage of songs and production. But I have to say, I have an affinity for Bossanova.

author: Wendell Pierce
content: New Orleans, more than many places I know, actually tangibly lives its culture. It's not just a residual of life it's a part of life. Music is at every major milestone of our life: birth, marriage, death. It's our culture.

author: Ben Nelson
content: Let me be clear. I support the definition of marriage as a union between a man and a woman.

author: Ezra Cornell
content: I was glad to hear of that determination as I detest the practice of cousins marrying or any marriage between persons in which there can be traced the most distant relationship. I go for the improvement instead of the deterioration of our race.

author: Jon Heder
content: Marriage is all about knowing the ins and outs and the intimate details, and your wife is supposed to be the person you know best. But my brother and I think alike, know everything about one another, and when we get together, we block everything else out. Nothing exists in our world except for us.

author: John Leguizamo
content: Marriage is wild. I thought it was this perfect land of happiness and joy. Wrong! After you say you do, you don't for a long time.

author: James Dobson
content: I'm certain that most couples expect to find intimacy in marriage, but it somehow eludes them.

author: Vanessa Kerry
content: I think there is a generation gap. I personally look forward to, as our generation becomes the leaders, you are gonna see a change, and I think hopefully gay marriage will be a part of that country.

author: Arlie Russell Hochschild
content: Many women cut back what had to be done at home by redefining what the house, the marriage and, sometimes, what the child needs. One woman described a fairly common pattern: I do my half. I do half of his half, and the rest doesn't get done.

author: Sonia Johnson
content: Obviously, the anti-ERA people are tickled about my ordeal because it proves that the ERA breaks up families. When they point out that feminism is a dangerous thing, I just say marriage is pretty precarious too.

author: Arlie Russell Hochschild
content: In response to our fast-food culture, a 'slow food' movement appeared. Out of hurried parenthood, a move toward slow parenting could be growing. With vital government supports for state-of-the-art public child care and paid parental leave, maybe we would be ready to try slow love and marriage.

author: Steve Chabot
content: Traditional marriage between a man and a woman has been a cornerstone of our society for generations. If we are going to change that, it ought to be done by the will of the people.

author: Sean Young
content: I don't particularly think marriage is a sane thing.

author: Karen Kingsbury
content: I'm receiving 300 to 500 letters every week from people telling me that God used my stories to save their marriage or to introduce them to Christ or to heal a relationship that had been broken.

author: Julia Ward Howe
content: Marriage, like death, is a debt we owe to nature.

author: Jeanne Tripplehorn
content: But I don't think that it's a form of family that I would be comfortable in. I've found a way to this character and this family, but I still believe that a marriage is between two people and not seven or three.

author: Rob Brydon
content: The thing is, when I had my first success it did coincide with the end of my first marriage, and because I went on to have a very, very unhappy two years, I don't think I equate career success with personal happiness.

author: Bridget Moynahan
content: When you're suddenly pregnant and no one is standing by your side, even if you're in your 30s, it's a hard conversation. I'm a traditional girl, and I believe in marriage, and I just always thought that's the way I'd be doing this.

author: Damon Wayans
content: And my marriage was perfect when I wasn't famous.

author: Connie Britton
content: I think that sense of humor is important in marriage. A sense of humor gets people through marriage.

author: James Brolin
content: The fact is, I am in my third marriage and I do not believe in divorce. But I was half the problem, I guarantee you. More than half the problem. I couldn't negotiate with the other women.

author: Judith Wright
content: Only after I faced the unhappiness of my first marriage did I start on the path of personal growth.

author: Mark Consuelos
content: I hope gay marriage will be legal in every state.

author: Jim Bunning
content: The activists will not stop in trying to impose their extreme views on the rest of us, and they have now plotted out a state-by-state strategy to increase the number of judicial decisions redefining marriage without the voice of the people being heard.

author: Ted Olson
content: The very idea of marriage is basic to recognition as equals in our society any status short of that is inferior, unjust, and unconstitutional.

author: Ted Olson
content: The United States Supreme Court has repeatedly held that marriage is one of the most fundamental rights that we have as Americans under our Constitution.

author: Jason Sudeikis
content: Each experience I go through - marriage, my public life, my personal life - I'm learning as I go.

author: Jared Polis
content: Gay marriage won't be more of an issue 25 years from now than interracial marriage is today.

author: Mary McCormack
content: I've done an informal, anecdotal survey about marriage, and I've found no evidence that it brings happiness.

author: Patrick White
content: My father and mother were second cousins, though they did not meet till shortly before their marriage.

author: John Sandford
content: There's something about marriage that is not as intensely romantic or interesting as a couple's first meeting.

author: Peter Criss
content: I finally got a chance to talk to my daughter from my previous marriage. I just got married May 3 to my beautiful wife, but we don't see each other much.

author: Benjamin Todd Jealous
content: Civil marriage, like all civil rights provided by the government, must be provided equally to all Americans.

author: Robert Foster Bennett
content: Marriage and the creation of families has been an integral part of our society since its creation it should not be defined without the kind of involvement by the people which a constitutional process would require.

author: Benjamin Todd Jealous
content: We are confident that the Supreme Court will soon see the direction that this country is headed and enshrine marriage as a constitutional right for all.

author: Jayne Meadows
content: Marriage, even the best marriages are tough.

author: Barry Hannah
content: I lost my second marriage because of drinking, and I loved the woman very much. But I thought I needed booze to write. I'm glad I was disabused.

author: Faith Evans
content: People used to say my son looked like a Mexican Biggie. And when he was first born, memories of Biggie... you know, we didn't always have the greatest days. For at least half the length of our marriage we were separated, so everyday was definitely not a good day.

author: Faith Evans
content: I guess you kind of got to realize that once you in a marriage, whatever it is, you gotta deal with it. Not necessarily that you got to accept it, but you have to deal with it and try your best to make it work for you, for the both of you.

author: Tamae Watanabe
content: The reason for not getting married was that I just didn't have a partner to get married to. Climbing mountains was more attractive to me than marriage, or other fun things like that.

author: Kenneth G. Wilson
content: My father was on the faculty in the Chemistry Department of Harvard University my mother had one year of graduate work in physics before her marriage.

author: Joyce Banda
content: I got married at 22 and remained in an abusive marriage for 10 years. I made up my mind that that was never going to happen to me again. I made a brave step to walk out in a society when you didn't walk out of an abusive marriage. It was mental and physical abuse.

author: Patsy Kensit
content: Everything in life is a lesson and I have learned from each marriage. Yes, I've made mistakes but every experience is a learning curve.

author: Anthony Storr
content: If we did not look to marriage as the principal source of happiness, fewer marriages would end in tears.

author: Sarah Ferguson
content: I left my marriage knowing I'd have to work. I have.

author: Kay Hagan
content: Religious institutions should have religious freedom on this issue. No church or minister should ever have to conduct a marriage that is inconsistent with their religious beliefs. But I think as a civil institution, this issue's time has come and we need to move forward.

author: Mario Cantone
content: Our black president can't say that he's for gay marriage. That is upsetting to me.

author: Jeff Sessions
content: Marriage has been defined by every legislature that has ever sat in the United States from every State, now 50 States, the same way, but now we have unelected judges altering and changing that fundamental institution.

author: Ty Burrell
content: There's lots of problem solving in any marriage, but when you have this collective goal that is a human being, it's an inspiring rally point.

author: Lawrence Block
content: To say I drank my way into marriage isn't much of an exaggeration, and it's none at all to say I drank my way out of it.

author: Joe Moore
content: Marriage: love, honor, and negotiate.

author: Shonda Rhimes
content: I've learned this is a very long marriage doing a television show. I like the people that I work with to be people I enjoy, so you want to cast people who are as excited and enthusiastic as you are.

author: Elisabetta Canalis
content: I am a firm believer in marriage. In the future I will be married.

author: Mike Rounds
content: Marriage is one of the most sacred human institutions. I asked our Senators, as many South Dakotans have done, to protect marriage as a union between a man and a woman.

author: Gavyn Davies
content: Other than marriage, she doesn't control me and I don't control her.

author: Curtis Sliwa
content: My wife disagrees with 100 percent of what I say. That's the same marriage I have.

author: Groucho Marx
content: I'm not feeling very well - I need a doctor immediately. Ring the nearest golf course.

author: Groucho Marx
content: A hospital bed is a parked taxi with the meter running.

author: Erma Bombeck
content: Never go to a doctor whose office plants have died.

author: Plato
content: They certainly give very strange names to diseases.

author: Erma Bombeck
content: Getting out of the hospital is a lot like resigning from a book club. You're not out of it until the computer says you're out of it.

author: Anton Chekhov
content: Medicine is my lawful wife and literature my mistress when I get tired of one, I spend the night with the other.

author: Rodney Dangerfield
content: When I was born I was so ugly the doctor slapped my mother.

author: Anton Chekhov
content: Doctors are just the same as lawyers the only difference is that lawyers merely rob you, whereas doctors rob you and kill you too.

author: Arthur Schopenhauer
content: The doctor sees all the weakness of mankind the lawyer all the wickedness, the theologian all the stupidity.

author: Napoleon Bonaparte
content: Doctors will have more lives to answer for in the next world than even we generals.

author: Isaac Asimov
content: All sorts of computer errors are now turning up. You'd be surprised to know the number of doctors who claim they are treating pregnant men.

author: Marcel Proust
content: Illness is the doctor to whom we pay most heed to kindness, to knowledge, we make promise only pain we obey.

author: Marcel Proust
content: Three-quarters of the sicknesses of intelligent people come from their intelligence. They need at least a doctor who can understand this sickness.

author: Samuel Butler
content: A physician's physiology has much the same relation to his power of healing as a cleric's divinity has to his power of influencing conduct.

author: Earl Wilson
content: You may not be able to read a doctor's handwriting and prescription, but you'll notice his bills are neatly typewritten.

author: Ivan Illich
content: Modern medicine is a negation of health. It isn't organized to serve human health, but only itself, as an institution. It makes more people sick than it heals.

author: Hippocrates
content: Whenever a doctor cannot do good, he must be kept from doing harm.

author: Denis Diderot
content: The best doctor is the one you run to and can't find.

author: Rita Rudner
content: I was going to have cosmetic surgery until I noticed that the doctor's office was full of portraits by Picasso.

author: Jack Kevorkian
content: As a medical doctor, it is my duty to evaluate the situation with as much data as I can gather and as much expertise as I have and as much experience as I have to determine whether or not the wish of the patient is medically justified.

author: Ovid
content: Time is generally the best doctor.

author: Walter Matthau
content: My doctor gave me six months to live, but when I couldn't pay the bill he gave me six months more.

author: Henny Youngman
content: When I told my doctor I couldn't afford an operation, he offered to touch-up my X-rays.

author: Lewis Thomas
content: The great secret of doctors, known only to their wives, but still hidden from the public, is that most things get better by themselves most things, in fact, are better in the morning.

author: Ovid
content: Medicine sometimes snatches away health, sometimes gives it.

author: Nicolas Cage
content: I was always shocked when I went to the doctor's office and they did my X-ray and didn't find that I had eight more ribs than I should have or that my blood was the color green.

author: Edward Everett Hale
content: In the name of Hypocrites, doctors have invented the most exquisite form of torture ever known to man: survival.

author: Dizzy Dean
content: The doctors x-rayed my head and found nothing.

author: Cesar Romero
content: I'm 86 and my doctor used to tell me to slow down - at least he did until he dropped dead.

author: Cass Canfield
content: Some people think that doctors and nurses can put scrambled eggs back in the shell.

author: Michael Landon
content: You can die of the cure before you die of the illness.

author: Martha Beck
content: People are so afraid of authority figures and doctors are authority figures.

author: Samuel Hahnemann
content: The physician's highest calling, his only calling, is to make sick people healthy - to heal, as it is termed.

author: Norman Cousins
content: It is reasonable to expect the doctor to recognize that science may not have all the answers to problems of health and healing.

author: Zoe Saldana
content: Growing up, my dolls were doctors and on secret missions. I had Barbie Goes Rambo.

author: Enid Bagnold
content: When a man goes through six years training to be a doctor he will never be the same. He knows too much.

author: Anthony Edwards
content: Flying back from New York, the flight attendant said 'God, I wished you were here yesterday, we had a stroke on the plane. I said, if I have a stroke on a plane, I hope the pretend doctor isn't the one on the plane. I want a real doctor.

author: Bill Frist
content: America has the best doctors, the best nurses, the best hospitals, the best medical technology, the best medical breakthrough medicines in the world. There is absolutely no reason we should not have in this country the best health care in the world.

author: Jay London
content: I went to the doctor and he said I had acute appendicitis, and I said compared to who?

author: Charles Schumer
content: I'm strongly for a patient Bill of Rights. Decisions ought to be made by doctors, not accountants.

author: Zach Braff
content: I'm by no means condemning prescription medicine for mental health. I've seen it save a lot of people's lives.

author: Charlotte Ross
content: Mammograms are really sort of a gift. You can either catch something early or count your lucky stars because nothing was discovered. Either way, you're ahead of the game.

author: Ralph Merkle
content: If you look at the human condition today, not everyone is well fed, has access to good medical care, or the physical basics that provide for a healthy and a happy life.

author: Peter Shaffer
content: Passion, you see, can be destroyed by a doctor. It cannot be created.

author: Martin H. Fischer
content: In the sick room, ten cents' worth of human understanding equals ten dollars' worth of medical science.

author: John Ensign
content: Medical liability reform is not a Republican or Democrat issue or even a doctor versus lawyer issue. It is a patient issue.

author: Thomas Sydenham
content: The art of medicine was to be properly learned only from its practice and its exercise.

author: Barbara Mikulski
content: A pregnant woman facing the most dire circumstances must be able to count on her doctor to do what is medically necessary to protect her from serious physical harm.

author: James H. Boren
content: I got the bill for my surgery. Now I know what those doctors were wearing masks for.

author: Alex Chiu
content: Honestly, being a doctor could make you more close minded than regular people.

author: Nathan Deal
content: As a physician, I know many doctors want to utilize new technology, but they find the cost prohibitive.

author: Ty Cobb
content: I regret to this day that I never went to college. I feel I should have been a doctor.

author: Alice James
content: One has a greater sense of degradation after an interview with a doctor than from any human experience.

author: David Jones
content: Doctors coin money when they do procedures but family medicine doesn't have any procedures.

author: Dwight D. Eisenhower
content: If you want total security, go to prison. There you're fed, clothed, given medical care and so on. The only thing lacking... is freedom.

author: Mark Twain
content: The Christian's Bible is a drug store. Its contents remain the same, but the medical practice changes.

author: Ronald Reagan
content: You know, if I listened to Michael Dukakis long enough, I would be convinced we're in an economic downturn and people are homeless and going without food and medical attention and that we've got to do something about the unemployed.

author: Steve Jobs
content: These technologies can make life easier, can let us touch people we might not otherwise. You may have a child with a birth defect and be able to get in touch with other parents and support groups, get medical information, the latest experimental drugs. These things can profoundly influence life. I'm not downplaying that.

author: Barack Obama
content: We can't get to the $4 trillion in savings that we need by just cutting the 12 percent of the budget that pays for things like medical research and education funding and food inspectors and the weather service. And we can't just do it by making seniors pay more for Medicare.

author: Ron Paul
content: I had the privilege of practicing medicine in the early '60s, before we had any government. It worked rather well, and there was nobody on the street suffering with no medical care.

author: Bill Hicks
content: If you're so pro-life, do me a favour: don't lock arms and block medical clinics. If you're so pro-life, lock arms and block cemeteries.

author: Bill Maher
content: Whenever the people are for gay marriage or medical marijuana or assisted suicide, suddenly the 'will of the people' goes out the window.

author: Samora Machel
content: The rich man's dog gets more in the way of vaccination, medicine and medical care than do the workers upon whom the rich man's wealth is built.

author: Samuel Butler
content: Vaccination is the medical sacrament corresponding to baptism. Whether it is or is not more efficacious I do not know.

author: Rush Limbaugh
content: Folks, the most insidious part of this whole health care scheme is that all of these vast medical expenditures will become nothing more than government budget items. We individuals will no longer exist. The relationship between a government and citizen will change forever.

author: Anita Baker
content: Completeness? Happiness? These words don't come close to describing my emotions. There truly is nothing I can say to capture what motherhood means to me, particularly given my medical history.

author: Tina Fey
content: A Harvard Medical School study has determined that rectal thermometers are still the best way to tell a baby's temperature. Plus, it really teaches the baby who's boss.

author: Deepak Chopra
content: I went to medical school because I wanted to ask the big questions. Do we have a soul? Does God exist? What happens after death?

author: Brad Henry
content: No one should have to choose between medicine and other necessities. No one should have to use the emergency room every time a child gets sick. And no one should have to live in constant fear that a medical problem will become a financial crisis.

author: Michael J. Fox
content: Medical science has proven time and again that when the resources are provided, great progress in the treatment, cure, and prevention of disease can occur.

author: Terry Pratchett
content: It seems sensible to me that we should look to the medical profession, that over the centuries has helped us to live longer and healthier lives, to help us die peacefully among our loved ones in our own home without a long stay in God's waiting room.

author: Terry Pratchett
content: I believe it should be possible for someone stricken with a serious and ultimately fatal illness to choose to die peacefully with medical help, rather than suffer.

author: Abe Lemons
content: Finish last in your league and they call you idiot. Finish last in medical school and they call you doctor.

author: Chris Christie
content: A retired teacher paid $62,000 towards her pension and nothing, yes nothing, for full family medical, dental and vision coverage over her entire career. What will we pay her? $1.4 million in pension benefits and another $215,000 in health care benefit premiums over her lifetime.

author: David Suzuki
content: The medical literature tells us that the most effective ways to reduce the risk of heart disease, cancer, stroke, diabetes, Alzheimer's, and many more problems are through healthy diet and exercise. Our bodies have evolved to move, yet we now use the energy in oil instead of muscles to do our work.

author: Margaret Sanger
content: Against the State, against the Church, against the silence of the medical profession, against the whole machinery of dead institutions of the past, the woman of today arises.

author: Nicole Kidman
content: Stay out of the sun, because it is the worst thing in terms of aging. I'm very medical. I come from a medical family.

author: Jack Welch
content: What's important at the grocery store is just as important in engines or medical systems. If the customer isn't satisfied, if the stuff is getting stale, if the shelf isn't right, or if the offerings aren't right, it's the same thing. You manage it like a small organization. You don't get hung up on zeros.

author: Jenny McCarthy
content: Information on how to heal autism and how to possibly delay vaccines or prevent autism shouldn't come from me. It should come from the medical establishment.

author: Venus Williams
content: I have been recently diagnosed with Sjogren's Syndrome, an autoimmune disease which is an ongoing medical condition that affects my energy level and causes fatigue and joint pain.

author: Paul Farmer
content: Civil and political rights are critical, but not often the real problem for the destitute sick. My patients in Haiti can now vote but they can't get medical care or clean water.

author: Danica McKellar
content: I know we can't always know what medical surprises may happen during childbirth. But my hope is to go fully natural - no epidural, no interventions. Wish me luck.

author: Tony Campolo
content: But I contend that if we're providing total medical coverage for every man, woman, and child in Iraq, shouldn't we at least be doing the same thing for every man, woman, and child in the United States?

author: Thomas Frank
content: Money has transformed every watchdog, every independent authority. Medical doctors are increasingly gulled by the lobbying of pharmaceutical salesmen.

author: Thomas Frank
content: Liberal that I am, I support health-care reform on its merits alone. My liberal blood boils, for example, when I read that half of the personal bankruptcies in this country are brought on, in part, by medical expenses.

author: Natalie Portman
content: My dad's a doctor, and when I was 8, I went to one of his medical conferences where they were demonstrating laser surgery on a chicken. I was so mad that a chicken had to die, I never ate meat again.

author: Benjamin Carson
content: I first wanted to be a psychiatrist. I decided against that in medical school when I discovered that psychiatrists didn't, in reality, do what they did on TV.

author: Benjamin Carson
content: Over the years my mother's steadfast faith in God has inspired me, particularly when I had to perform extremely difficult surgical procedures or when I found myself faced with my own medical scare.

author: Stephen Harper
content: I think first and foremost everybody should understand that Canadians are strongly committed to the system of universal health insurance, to the principle that your ability to pay does not determine your access to critical medical service.

author: Arlen Specter
content: The best way to reduce the cost of medical care is to reduce the illness.

author: Ralph Merkle
content: If we can reduce the cost and improve the quality of medical technology through advances in nanotechnology, we can more widely address the medical conditions that are prevalent and reduce the level of human suffering.

author: Colin Firth
content: My parents and grandparents have always been engaged in teaching or the medical profession or the priesthood, so I've sort of grown up with a sense of complicity in the lives of other people, so there's no virtue in that it's the way one is raised.

author: Lewis Thomas
content: Medical knowledge and technical savvy are biodegradable. The sort of medicine that was practiced in Boston or New York or Atlanta fifty years ago would be as strange to a medical student or intern today as the ceremonial dance of a !Kung San tribe would seem to a rock festival audience in Hackensack.

author: Lewis Thomas
content: The dilemma of modern medicine, and the underlying central flaw in medical education and, most of all, in the training of interns, is the irresistible drive to do something, anything. It is expected by patients and too often agreed to by their doctors, in the face of ignorance.

author: John Sununu
content: It worries me about our unwillingness to really address reforms and modernization in Medicare. This thing was designed 37 years ago. It has not evolved to keep pace with current medical technology.

author: Julie Burchill
content: Mind you, I've always been a very off-message type of fat broad one who gladly admits she reached the size she is now solely through lack of discipline and love of pleasure, and who rather despises people (except those with proven medical conditions) who pretend that it is generally otherwise.

author: Ashley Montagu
content: One goes through school, college, medical school and one's internship learning little or nothing about goodness but a good deal about success.

author: Ashley Montagu
content: There have been some medical schools in which somewhere along the assembly line, a faculty member has informed the students, not so much by what he said but by what he did, that there is an intimate relation between curing and caring.

author: Paul Farmer
content: It is clear that the pharmaceutical industry is not, by any stretch of the imagination, doing enough to ensure that the poor have access to adequate medical care.

author: Edward Bach
content: The main reason for the failure of the modern medical science is that it is dealing with results and not causes. Nothing more than the patching up of those attacked and the burying of those who are slain, without a thought being given to the real strong hold.

author: Stanislav Grof

author: Jean de la Bruyere
content: All men's misfortunes spring from their hatred of being alone.

author: Ernest Gaines
content: Why is it that, as a culture, we are more comfortable seeing two men holding guns than holding hands?

author: Leo Tolstoy
content: The chief difference between words and deeds is that words are always intended for men for their approbation, but deeds can be done only for God.

author: Edwin Louis Cole
content: Reasonable men adapt to the world around them unreasonable men make the world adapt to them. The world is changed by unreasonable men.

author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery
content: One can be a brother only in something. Where there is no tie that binds men, men are not united but merely lined up.

author: Charlotte Bronte
content: Men judge us by the success of our efforts. God looks at the efforts themselves.

author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery
content: Only the unknown frightens men. But once a man has faced the unknown, that terror becomes the known.

author: Andrew Carnegie
content: The 'morality of compromise' sounds contradictory. Compromise is usually a sign of weakness, or an admission of defeat. Strong men don't compromise, it is said, and principles should never be compromised.

author: Ezra Pound
content: Men do not understand books until they have a certain amount of life, or at any rate no man understands a deep book, until he has seen and lived at least part of its contents.

author: Harry S. Truman
content: Study men, not historians.

author: Joseph Conrad
content: The belief in a supernatural source of evil is not necessary men alone are quite capable of every wickedness.

author: Isaiah Berlin
content: Injustice, poverty, slavery, ignorance - these may be cured by reform or revolution. But men do not live only by fighting evils. They live by positive goals, individual and collective, a vast variety of them, seldom predictable, at times incompatible.

author: Isaac Asimov
content: He had read much, if one considers his long life but his contemplation was much more than his reading. He was wont to say that if he had read as much as other men he should have known no more than other men.

author: Oliver Wendell Holmes
content: Controversy equalizes fools and wise men - and the fools know it.

author: Yul Brynner
content: Girls have an unfair advantage over men: if they can't get what they want by being smart, they can get it by being dumb.

author: Herodotus
content: Men trust their ears less than their eyes.

author: Thurgood Marshall
content: Our whole constitutional heritage rebels at the thought of giving government the power to control men's minds.

author: Maurice Maeterlinck
content: At every crossroads on the path that leads to the future, tradition has placed 10,000 men to guard the past.

author: Richard J. Needham
content: Every woman needs one man in her life who is strong and responsible. Given this security, she can proceed to do what she really wants to do-fall in love with men who are weak and irresponsible.

author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery
content: We say nothing essential about the cathedral when we speak of its stones. We say nothing essential about Man when we seek to define him by the qualities of men.

author: John Locke
content: There is frequently more to be learned from the unexpected questions of a child than the discourses of men.

author: Thomas Fuller
content: Wine hath drowned more men than the sea.

author: William Butler Yeats
content: The worst thing about some men is that when they are not drunk they are sober.

author: Alexander Pope
content: Some old men, continually praise the time of their youth. In fact, you would almost think that there were no fools in their days, but unluckily they themselves are left as an example.

author: Edwin Louis Cole
content: Inconsistencies in men are generally testimony to their immaturity.

author: Susan B. Anthony
content: I do not consider divorce an evil by any means. It is just as much a refuge for women married to brutal men as Canada was to the slaves of brutal masters.

author: David Hilbert
content: If one were to bring ten of the wisest men in the world together and ask them what was the most stupid thing in existence, they would not be able to discover anything so stupid as astrology.

author: Bette Davis
content: Strong women only marry weak men.

author: John Ruskin
content: Men don't and can't live by exchanging articles, but by producing them. They don't live by trade, but by work. Give up that foolish and vain title of Trades Unions and take that of laborers Unions.

author: Georg C. Lichtenberg
content: Prejudices are so to speak the mechanical instincts of men: through their prejudices they do without any effort many things they would find too difficult to think through to the point of resolving to do them.

author: Jean-Jacques Rousseau
content: No man has any natural authority over his fellow men.

author: Walter Lippmann
content: In a free society the state does not administer the affairs of men. It administers justice among men who conduct their own affairs.

author: Alexander Pope
content: The most positive men are the most credulous.

author: George Washington
content: My mother was the most beautiful woman I ever saw. All I am I owe to my mother. I attribute all my success in life to the moral, intellectual and physical education I received from her.

author: Jessica Lange
content: The natural state of motherhood is unselfishness. When you become a mother, you are no longer the center of your own universe. You relinquish that position to your children.

author: Mark Twain
content: My mother had a great deal of trouble with me, but I think she enjoyed it.

author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
content: Men are what their mothers made them.

author: Pablo Picasso
content: My mother said to me, 'If you are a soldier, you will become a general. If you are a monk, you will become the Pope.' Instead, I was a painter, and became Picasso.

author: Aristotle
content: Mothers are fonder than fathers of their children because they are more certain they are their own.

author: Erich Fromm
content: The mother-child relationship is paradoxical and, in a sense, tragic. It requires the most intense love on the mother's side, yet this very love must help the child grow away from the mother, and to become fully independent.

author: Billy Graham
content: Only God Himself fully appreciates the influence of a Christian mother in the molding of character in her children.

author: Lauryn Hill
content: That strong mother doesn't tell her cub, Son, stay weak so the wolves can get you. She says, Toughen up, this is reality we are living in.

author: Erma Bombeck
content: It is not until you become a mother that your judgment slowly turns to compassion and understanding.

author: Ellen DeGeneres
content: I ask people why they have deer heads on their walls. They always say because it's such a beautiful animal. There you go. I think my mother is attractive, but I have photographs of her.

author: E. M. Forster
content: I am sure that if the mothers of various nations could meet, there would be no more wars.

author: Sophia Loren
content: When you are a mother, you are never really alone in your thoughts. A mother always has to think twice, once for herself and once for her child.

author: Alice Walker
content: Yes, Mother. I can see you are flawed. You have not hidden it. That is your greatest gift to me.

author: Ambrose Bierce
content: Sweater, n.: garment worn by child when its mother is feeling chilly.

author: Erma Bombeck
content: Who in their infinite wisdom decreed that Little League uniforms be white? Certainly not a mother.

author: Henry Ward Beecher
content: The mother's heart is the child's schoolroom.

author: Carly Fiorina
content: My mother taught me about the power of inspiration and courage, and she did it with a strength and a passion that I wish could be bottled.

author: Chris Brown
content: My mother taught me to treat a lady respectfully.

author: Elizabeth Taylor
content: I've been through it all, baby, I'm mother courage.

author: Ruby Wax
content: Being a mother is hard and it wasn't a subject I ever studied.

author: Honore de Balzac
content: It is only in the act of nursing that a woman realizes her motherhood in visible and tangible fashion it is a joy of every moment.

author: Susie Bright
content: I'm a Mommy's Girl - the strongest influence in my young life was my mom.

author: Dick Gregory
content: When you have a good mother and no father, God kind of sits in. It's not enough, but it helps.

author: Alice Hoffman
content: Mothers always find ways to fit in the work - but then when you're working, you feel that you should be spending time with your children and then when you're with your children, you're thinking about working.

author: Alice Walker
content: How simple a thing it seems to me that to know ourselves as we are, we must know our mothers names.

author: Camille Paglia
content: Every man must define his identity against his mother. If he does not, he just falls back into her and is swallowed up.

author: Denzel Washington
content: My mother used to tell me man gives the award, God gives the reward. I don't need another plaque.

author: Helen Hunt Jackson
content: Motherhood is priced Of God, at price no man may dare To lessen or misunderstand.

author: Arianna Huffington
content: The fastest way to break the cycle of perfectionism and become a fearless mother is to give up the idea of doing it perfectly - indeed to embrace uncertainty and imperfection.

author: Mike Krzyzewski
content: Throughout my life, my mom has been the person that I've always looked up to.

author: Margaret Sanger
content: When motherhood becomes the fruit of a deep yearning, not the result of ignorance or accident, its children will become the foundation of a new race.

author: Anita Baker
content: Completeness? Happiness? These words don't come close to describing my emotions. There truly is nothing I can say to capture what motherhood means to me, particularly given my medical history.

author: Meryl Streep
content: Motherhood has a very humanizing effect. Everything gets reduced to essentials.

author: Louisa May Alcott
content: What do girls do who haven't any mothers to help them through their troubles?

author: Maxim Gorky
content: Only mothers can think of the future - because they give birth to it in their children.

author: Barbara Ehrenreich
content: Take motherhood: nobody ever thought of putting it on a moral pedestal until some brash feminists pointed out, about a century ago, that the pay is lousy and the career ladder nonexistent.

author: Sandra Bullock
content: I was a brownie for a day. My mom made me stop. She didn't want me to conform.

author: Bill Watterson
content: Mothers are the necessity of invention.

author: Amos Bronson Alcott
content: Where there is a mother in the home, matters go well.

author: Al Sharpton
content: I was raised by a single mother who made a way for me. She used to scrub floors as a domestic worker, put a cleaning rag in her pocketbook and ride the subways in Brooklyn so I would have food on the table. But she taught me as I walked her to the subway that life is about not where you start, but where you're going. That's family values.

author: Joel Madden
content: My mom always said that there would be haters. Not everyone can love ya.

author: Barbara Bush
content: I may be the only mother in America who knows exactly what their child is up to all the time.

author: Elayne Boosler
content: The Vatican is against surrogate mothers. Good thing they didn't have that rule when Jesus was born.

author: Alphonsus Liguori
content: Just as a mother finds pleasure in taking her little child on her lap, there to feed and caress him, in like manner our loving God shows His fondness for His beloved souls who have given themselves entirely to Him and have placed all their hope in His goodness.

author: Ann Romney
content: It's the moms of this nation - single, married, widowed - who really hold this country together. We're the mothers, we're the wives, we're the grandmothers, we're the big sisters, we're the little sisters, we're the daughters. You know it's true, don't you? You're the ones who always have to do a little more.

author: E. W. Howe
content: If there were no schools to take the children away from home part of the time, the insane asylums would be filled with mothers.

author: Adam Sandler
content: I sing seriously to my mom on the phone. To put her to sleep, I have to sing 'Maria' from West Side Story. When I hear her snoring, I hang up.

author: Della Reese
content: My mother was a personal friend of God's. They had ongoing conversations.

author: Brigitte Bardot
content: I am no mother, and I won't be one.

author: Annette Funicello
content: Of all the roles I've played, none has been as fulfilling as being a mother.

author: Janice Dickinson
content: Mothers don't let your daughters grow up to be models unless you're present.

author: David Rockefeller
content: I owe much to mother. She had an expert's understanding, but also approached art emotionally.

author: Emma Bonino
content: A woman must combine the role of mother, wife and politician.

author: Carol Burnett
content: I wish my mother had left me something about how she felt growing up. I wish my grandmother had done the same. I wanted my girls to know me.

author: Clay Aiken
content: My mother taught me that we all have the power to achieve our dreams. What I lacked was the courage.

author: Sandra Bullock
content: I basically became a cheerleader because I had a very strict mom. That was my way of being a bad girl.

author: Benjamin Spock
content: There are only two things a child will share willingly communicable diseases and its mother's age.

author: Rebecca West
content: Motherhood is the strangest thing, it can be like being one's own Trojan horse.

author: Loretta Lynn
content: Mommy smoked but she didn't want us to. She saw smoke coming out of the barn one time, so we got whipped.

author: Jane Elliot
content: I loved raising my kids. I loved the process, the dirt of it, the tears of it, the frustration of it, Christmas, Easter, birthdays, growth charts, pediatrician appointments. I loved all of it.

author: Arianna Huffington
content: I think while all mothers deal with feelings of guilt, working mothers are plagued by guilt on steroids!

author: Roma Downey
content: What is free time? I'm a single mother. My free moments are filled with loving my little girl.

author: David Geffen
content: I am truly my mother's son.

author: Milo Ventimiglia
content: My sisters and mom raised me to respect women and open doors for them.

author: Ben Affleck
content: My mother gets all mad at me if I stay in a hotel. I'm 31-years-old, and I don't want to sleep on a sleeping bag down in the basement. It's humiliating.

author: Zhang Ziyi
content: I wanted to escape so badly. But of course I knew I couldn't just give up and leave school. It was only when I heard my mom's voice that I came out of my hiding place.

author: Arnold Bennett
content: Mother is far too clever to understand anything she does not like.

author: Ashley Scott
content: Everyone checks out my mom. My mom's hot.

author: Tori Spelling
content: I want to be a cool mom.

author: Claudette Colbert
content: Why do grandparents and grandchildren get along so well? The mother.

author: Celine Dion
content: I want to be more successful as a mother than I am in show business.

author: Ed Bradley
content: My mother worked in factories, worked as a domestic, worked in a restaurant, always had a second job.

author: Candice Bergen
content: I guess I was a mom so late in life, my daughter was the greatest thing since sliced bread.

author: Harriet Ann Jacobs
content: Always it gave me a pang that my children had no lawful claim to a name.

author: Nikki Reed
content: I think my mother is my biggest influence. There are so many things I hate about her but at the same time I'm thankful for her. All I know is that when I'm a parent I want to be just like my mom. I can talk to my mom more than any of my friends could talk to their parents.

author: Candace Cameron Bure
content: I'm so happy and thankful I made it a point be a stay-at-home mom.

author: Toni Braxton
content: I'd lose my mind if I heard my kid call the nanny Mommy.

author: Buck Owens
content: My mother told me on several different occasions that she was livin' her dream vicariously through me. She once said that I was getting' to do all the things that she would have wanted to have done.

author: Andy Partridge
content: My parents, especially my mother, were no influence on me whatsoever.

author: Paul Harris
content: Motherhood is at its best when the tender chords of sympathy have been touched.

author: Emma Goldman
content: Morality and its victim, the mother - what a terrible picture! Is there indeed anything more terrible, more criminal, than our glorified sacred function of motherhood?

author: Dorothy Fields
content: The man in our society is the breadwinner the woman has enough to do as the homemaker, wife and mother.

author: Art Linkletter
content: I stand fearlessly for small dogs, the American Flag, motherhood and the Bible. That's why people love me.

author: Christie Hefner
content: My mother thinks I could have even run a larger company.

author: Toby Keith
content: My mom taught us the Serenity Prayer at a young age.

author: Al Lewis
content: What motivated me? My mother. My mother was an immigrant woman, a peasant woman, struggled all her life, worked in the garment center.

author: Elizabeth Cady Stanton
content: The woman is uniformly sacrificed to the wife and mother.

author: Joely Fisher
content: I'm sure that my mom would have been happy with any path I chose.

author: Kate Hudson
content: I auditioned on my own. I tried to make a mark for myself without anybody's help, not even Mom's.

author: Nicole Appleton
content: Giving birth was easier than having a tattoo.

author: Larisa Oleynik
content: If my mom reads that I'm grammatically incorrect I'll have hell to pay.

author: Charles Pierce
content: If you ever become a mother, can I have one of the puppies?

author: Eminem
content: I'd go to, like, six different schools in one year. We were on welfare, and my mom never ever worked.

author: Barack Obama
content: We need somebody who's got the heart, the empathy, to recognize what it's like to be a young teenage mom, the empathy to understand what it's like to be poor or African-American or gay or disabled or old - and that's the criterion by which I'll be selecting my judges.

author: Tim Allen
content: Dad needs to show an incredible amount of respect and humor and friendship toward his mate so the kids understand their parents are sexy, they're fun, they do things together, they're best friends. Kids learn by example. If I respect Mom, they're going to respect Mom.

author: Mitt Romney
content: Mom and Dad were married 64 years. And if you wondered what their secret was, you could have asked the local florist - because every day Dad gave Mom a rose, which he put on her bedside table. That's how she found out what happened on the day my father died - she went looking for him because that morning, there was no rose.

author: Mitt Romney
content: My mom and dad gave their kids the greatest gift of all - the gift of unconditional love. They cared deeply about who we would be, and much less about what we would do.

author: Roseanne Barr
content: A guy is a lump like a doughnut. So, first you gotta get rid of all the stuff his mom did to him. And then you gotta get rid of all that macho crap that they pick up from beer commercials. And then there's my personal favorite, the male ego.

author: Mitt Romney
content: When my mom ran for the Senate, my dad was there for her every step of the way. I can still hear her saying in her beautiful voice, 'Why should women have any less say than men, about the great decisions facing our nation?'

author: Jami Gertz
content: Being a Hot Mom means being respected as a mom and a woman. And, the key to being a Hot Mom is having a sense of humor about yourself and all the crazy situations that arise.

author: Scott Brooks
content: I believe this with all my heart: The greatest coach of all time in my eyes is my mom. She's instilled in me a toughness and a perseverance and just a never-quit mentality, and I thank her every day for providing me, for what she sacrificed her life for.

author: Lance Armstrong
content: My mom was such a strong character. I don't want to say she was like a man, but she was tough.

author: Taylor Swift
content: My mom and I have always been really close. She's always been the friend that was always there. There were times when, in middle school and junior high, I didn't have a lot of friends. But my mom was always my friend. Always.

author: Taylor Swift
content: For everything I do, I think about a 6-year-old girl and her mom that I saw at my concert last night. I think about what those two individuals would think if I were at a club last night. I never want to be arrested, and I never want to get a DUI, those are my moral values.

author: Stevie Nicks
content: It was my 16th birthday - my mom and dad gave me my Goya classical guitar that day. I sat down, wrote this song, and I just knew that that was the only thing I could ever really do - write songs and sing them to people.

author: Michelle Obama
content: As a mom, I know it is my responsibility, and no one else's, to raise my kids. But we have to ask ourselves, what does it mean when so many parents are finding their best efforts undermined by an avalanche of advertisements aimed at our kids.

author: Jim DeMint
content: One of the greatest titles in the world is parent, and one of the biggest blessings in the world is to have parents to call mom and dad.

author: Sarah Palin
content: I love those hockey moms. You know what they say the difference between a hockey mom and a pit bull is? Lipstick.

author: LeBron James
content: For me, already being part of a single parent household and knowing it was just me and my mom, you'd would wake up times and hope that the next day you'd be able to be alongside your mother because she was out trying to make sure that I was taken care of. But all I cared about was her being home.

author: Cuba Gooding, Jr.
content: Don't let people disrespect you. My mom says don't open the door to the devil. Surround yourself with positive people.

author: Jenny McCarthy
content: Having a child makes you realize the importance of life - narcissism goes out the window. Heaven on earth is looking at my little boy. The minute he was born, I knew if I never did anything other than being a mom, I'd be fine.

author: Kim Kardashian
content: My mom and I had the same vision, and we want the same things. We would always make a goal list every year.

author: Miley Cyrus
content: I don't want to be perfect, but I do want to be a role model. My mom always tells me that imperfections equal beauty. All of us are imperfect.

author: Cindy Crawford
content: When you are getting ready to become a mom, being in love with someone just isn't enough. You need to think about whether he would be a good parent and raise your children with similar beliefs.

author: Demi Lovato
content: My sisters and my mom, those people help me get through every single day.

author: Miley Cyrus
content: I told my mom, 'I'm not buying another magazine until I can get past this thought of looking like the girl on the cover'. She said, "Miley, you are the girl on the cover,' and I was, like, 'I know, but I don't feel like that girl every day.' You can't always feel perfect.

author: Laurie Anderson
content: When love is gone, there's always justice. And when justice is gone, there's always force. And when force is gone, there's always Mom. Hi, Mom!

author: Tori Spelling
content: I love my mom. My mom loves me. We don't have an easy relationship. I don't think we ever will, but I'd rather have a complicated, misunderstood relationship than have no relationship at all.

author: Tyra Banks
content: My mom never taught me to be waiting for some prince on a white horse to swipe me off my feet.

author: Kim Kardashian
content: I always wanted what Mom and Dad had.

author: Ellen DeGeneres
content: My dad is still Christian Scientist. My mom's not, and I'm not. But I believe in God, and that there's a higher power and an intelligence that's bigger than us and that we can rely on. It's not just us, thinking we are the ones in control of everything. That idea gives me support.

author: Quentin Tarantino
content: My mom took me to see Carnal Knowledge and The Wild Bunch and all these kind of movies when I was a kid.

author: Jim Valvano
content: People think I have courage. The courage in my family are my wife Pam, my three daughters, here, Nicole, Jamie, LeeAnn, my mom, who's right here too.

author: LeBron James
content: When I was 5, some financial things happened, and I moved seven times in a year. We moved from apartment to apartment, sometimes living with friends. My mom would always say, 'Don't get comfortable, because we may not be here long.'

author: Charlize Theron
content: I can only hope to be 10 percent of the mom mine was to me. She encouraged me to be confident and enjoy life. That's what I want for my son.

author: Charlize Theron
content: You know, I don't think any mother aims to be a single mom. I didn't wish for that, but it happened.

author: Paris Hilton
content: My mom decorated with lots of antiques. I never liked it when I was a little girl - I wanted to live in a modern house. But now I love it.

author: Paul McCartney
content: Looking back, I think I was always musical. My dad was very musical, and I think my mom was musical.

author: Michelle Obama
content: It wasn't so long ago that I was a working mom myself. And I know that sometimes, much as we all hate to admit it, it's just easier to park the kids in front of the TV for a few hours, so we can pay the bills or do the laundry or just have some peace and quiet for a change.

author: Mike Krzyzewski
content: The person who has inspired me my whole life is my Mom, because she taught me commitment. She sacrificed.

author: Miley Cyrus
content: My mom is always telling me it takes a long time to get to the top, but a short time to get to the bottom.

author: Lady Gaga
content: My mom and I are very close.

author: Shia LaBeouf
content: My mom is the backbone not just of my family but of many families.

author: Alanis Morissette
content: I could get away with not taking care of myself as a bachelorette but as a mom I can't.

author: Paul Ryan
content: Mom was 50 when my Dad died. She got on a bus every weekday for years, and rode 40 miles each morning to Madison. She earned a new degree and learned new skills to start her small business. It wasn't just a new livelihood. It was a new life.

author: Paul Ryan
content: And to this day, my Mom is my role model.

author: Paul Ryan
content: A Romney-Ryan administration will protect and strengthen Medicare, for my Mom's generation, for my generation, and for my kids and yours.

author: Taylor Swift
content: What makes me happy is just curling up in with my mom in her bed and watching a marathon of 'CSI' and 'Grey's Anatomy' episodes with pints of ice cream.

author: Emeril Lagasse
content: I started cooking when I was about 10. I have memories like when I was 6 or 7 with my mom, and when I was 12 I started getting real serious about cooking.

author: John Boehner
content: Studies show that children best flourish when one mom and one dad are there to raise them.

author: Amy Winehouse
content: I know I'm talented, but I wasn't put here to sing. I was put here to be a wife and a mom and look after my family. I love what I do, but it's not where it begins and ends.

author: Tiger Woods
content: My mom was tough.

author: Jeff Bridges
content: When I was really young, my mom enrolled me in dance classes.

author: Jeff Bridges
content: I think my love of journalizing my life comes from my mom.

author: Jeff Bridges
content: My mom wasn't a movie star.

author: Tori Amos
content: I became a mom at 37 and having a child has been an emancipation for me.

author: Emeril Lagasse
content: My inspiration was my mom. She's a great cook, and she still cooks, and we still banter back and forth about cooking. Growing up in a mostly Portuguese community, food was important and the family table was extremely important. At a very young age I understood that.

author: Marco Rubio
content: My parents were working class folks. My dad was a bartender for most of his life, my mom was a maid and a cashier and a stock clerk at WalMart. We were not people of financial means in terms of significant financial means. I always told them, 'I didn't always have what I wanted. I always had what I needed.' My parents always provided that.

author: Marco Rubio
content: My dad was a bartender. My mom was a cashier, a maid and a stock clerk at K-Mart. They never made it big. They were never rich. And yet they were successful. Because just a few decades removed from hopelessness, they made possible for us all the things that had been impossible for them.

author: Norah Jones
content: My mom and I have always been very close. She is my best friend. She had to make a lot of sacrifices early on in my life to make sure I got to do what I wanted to do.

author: Christina Aguilera
content: My mom brought me up to believe that my talent is a gift and a blessing.

author: Christina Aguilera
content: Thankfully, I have my mom and a small group of close friends who are there for me 24/7 and whom I can trust and depend on.

author: Christina Aguilera
content: I remember watching the Grammys and looking at the performances and crying to my mom, saying how much I wanted to be there.

author: Heidi Klum
content: I always wanted to be a mom.

author: Heidi Klum
content: When I was younger, I had a perm, and it was really big. My mom was a hairdresser, so even my dad had a perm! I looked like a poodle, but it was cool at the time.

author: Heidi Klum
content: I'm a lioness. I have four cubs. I'm a mom. I want to take care of my kids and protect them.

author: Shia LaBeouf
content: My mom is at my house every day, and she nags me about everything, especially hygiene.

author: Tori Amos
content: I remember driving to North Carolina when I was a little girl in a snowstorm to get down to my mom's family in the Carolinas. There were chains on the car - it was the late sixties - and we were just singing in the car. Christmas carols.

author: Tori Amos
content: When I was little, my mom tells me, I used to say things like, 'Mom do you hear the string section? Do you hear the string section?' And she would look at me and say, 'No honey, I don't know what you're talking about.'

author: LeBron James
content: Being the only man in the household with my mom definitely helped me grow up fast.

author: Miley Cyrus
content: If I could get any animal it would be a dolphin. I want one so bad. Me and my mom went swimming with dolphins and I was like, 'How do we get one of those?' and she was like, 'You can't get a dolphin. What are you gonna do, like, put it in your pool?'

author: Daniel Radcliffe
content: I'm not a religious person. My mom was of Jewish blood and my dad was Protestant.

author: Daniel Radcliffe
content: My dad believes in God, I think. I'm not sure if my mom does. I don't.

author: Shania Twain
content: Fortunately, when you're a mom, the responsibility of caring for your child can keep you going.

author: Charlize Theron
content: My mom has made it possible for me to be who I am. Our family is everything. Her greatest skill was encouraging me to find my own person and own independence.

author: Nikki Sixx
content: I forgive my mom for being a psycho and my dad for being a loser.

author: Abigail Van Buren
content: It is a sad commentary of our times when our young must seek advice and counsel from 'Dear Abby' instead of going to Mom and Dad.

author: LeBron James
content: I hear my friends and my mom tell me I'm special, but honestly, I still don't get it.

author: LeBron James
content: My mom and I have always been there for each other. We had some tough times, but she was always there for me.

author: Avril Lavigne
content: I don't want to have kids for like 10 years. I still have a lot to do. I don't even know if I could handle a dog right now. I'm so not ready. Someday I'll be a mom but not until I'm in my 30s.

author: Hilary Rosen
content: As a mom I know that raising children is the hardest job there is.

author: Alexa Vega
content: I consider my mom and all my sisters my friends.

author: Larry David
content: The best situation is being a single parent. The best part about is that you get time off, too, because the kids are with their mom, so it's the best of both worlds. There's a lot to be said for it.

author: Leonardo DiCaprio
content: My mom, Irmelin, taught me the value of life. Her own life was saved by my grandmother during World War II.

author: Brandy Norwood
content: I'm going to let people know that it's cool to have a child and be young and still be a good mom. It's really tough, but I'm doing it.

author: Henry Louis Gates
content: My mom, God rest her soul - she liked nicknames. In the womb she named me Skip. There was another black guy in Piedmont, W.Va., and his name was Skip. They called him Big Skip, and I was Little Skip.

author: Fantasia Barrino
content: I feel like a good mom. I'm a strong woman now... Don't look down on me. Pray for me because I'm trying.

author: Chris Christie
content: And the greatest lesson that mom ever taught me though was this one. She told me there would be times in your life when you have to choose between being loved and being respected. Now she said to always pick being respected.

author: Tina Fey
content: Being a mom has made me so tired. And so happy.

author: Marion Jones
content: My father wasn't really involved and my mom is the light in my life.

author: Tom Morello
content: The real estate agent had to go door-to-door in the apartment building we wanted to rent, asking if it was OK for this interracial family - my mom is white and I was a 1-year-old half-African kid - to live in the apartment building.

author: Joseph Gordon-Levitt
content: My dad never blew anything up, but he probably had friends who did. He and my mom have always preached that the pen is mightier than a Molotov cocktail.

author: Tim Tebow
content: I grabbed my mom and I went to the couch and I said, 'Mom I want to ask Jesus to come into my heart.' And I got on my knee and I asked Jesus to come into my heart, forgive me of my sins, and make me a child of God.

author: Julia Roberts
content: My mom used to make everything. She had a great garden and composted and made everything from scratch - peanut butter, bread, jelly, everything. I don't know how she did it because all those things take time and love and labour. I only do half the stuff she does - but there's still time.

author: Candace Cameron Bure
content: I'm a mom, so I have to be comfortable. Jeans are a staple - I have way too many in my closet! It's warm in Florida, so I wear jeans and a tank top every day. I love my True Religions, my Rich and Skinny, and Citizens of Humanity. But I also love getting dressed up!

author: Chris Christie
content: Mom spent the time that she was supposed to be a kid actully raising children, her younger brother and younger sister. She was tough as nails and did not suffer fools at all. And the truth was she could not afford to. She spoke the truth, bluntly, directly, and without much varnish. I am her son.

author: Chris Brown
content: I didn't understand that I could sing until I was like 11 or 12. My mom heard me singing around the house and she said, What are you doing? You really can sing! So then I started going to school and singing to the girls.

author: Helena Bonham Carter
content: My mom being a psychotherapist, I've been brought up with that whole psychoanalytical terrain.

author: David Duchovny
content: I think the real heroic teachers are the ones who work with kids, like my mom and my sister do.

author: Miley Cyrus
content: I probably have an earlier curfew than anyone. My mom wants to keep me really safe and my dad's not overly protective, but he's a dad no matter what.

author: Lenny Kravitz
content: People always accuse me of being motivational in a way, like it was a bad thing, but that's just how I was raised. My mom raised me in a positive environment, with lots of love in my heart, and that reflects in my music.

author: Vin Diesel
content: My mom used to say that I became a fighter and a scrapper and a tough guy to protect who I am at my core.

author: Christina Ricci
content: My mom knows when something is real and something is not.

author: Ani DiFranco
content: I've never had a very closely connected family. My parents split up when I was young and I was living with my mom for a little while, then I was kind of just on my own really young. It wasn't some kind of global tragedy, it was just never really a very close-knit family. So there was support in the sense that they didn't stand in my way.

author: Diablo Cody
content: I just go about my life. I'm a mom, I drive an SUV, I go to the grocery store every day. I'm definitely not a celebrity. I always say that I'm a celebrity-adjacent.

author: Diablo Cody
content: Fact: The new '90210' is cooler than the old '90210.' It's the lithe, streamlined Skipper to the elder series' venerable Barbie. Gone are the traditional parents - they've been replaced by a hipster mom n' pop who get busted necking in the car.

author: Mia Hamm
content: I make a lot of mistakes, too, and I'm constantly re-evaluating how I'm doing things and trying to be better every day, whether it's as a mom or taking care of myself.

author: Maurice Sendak
content: Most children - I know I did when I was a kid - fantasize another set of parents. Or fantasize no parents. They don't tell their real parents about that - you don't want to tell Mom and Dad. Kids lead a very private life. And I was a typical child, I think. I was a liar.

author: Maurice Sendak
content: Most children - I know I did when I was a kid - fantasize another set of parents. Or fantasize no parents. They don't tell their real parents about that - you don't want to tell Mom and Dad.

author: Harry Connick, Jr.
content: My mom and I were super tight. I think she really wanted me to be an artist, you know? She used to like to tell people she wanted to be Beethoven's mother. That was her thing. She wanted to be the mother of this person.

author: Harry Connick, Jr.
content: My dad and mom believed that you do what you have to do in private and don't make a big deal out of it. Just try to help people as much as you can.

author: Mindy Kaling
content: My relationship with my mom is really the single most profound relationship that I've ever had in my life.

author: Brandon Boyd
content: My parents are wonderful, and I'm really lucky - but my mom has always been almost exclusively a right-brained person. She goes completely on her feelings of things, on her intuition, and so she instilled that in my brothers and I.

author: Adam Lambert
content: My dad is a Deadhead, my mom's a Jewish-American princess from Jersey.

author: Nelson Algren
content: Never play cards with a man called Doc. Never eat at a place called Mom's. Never sleep with a woman whose troubles are worse than your own.

author: Paula Poundstone
content: My Mom said she learned how to swim when someone took her out in the lake and threw her off the boat. I said, 'Mom, they weren't trying to teach you how to swim.'

author: Shaun White
content: My mom was a waitress, and my dad was a plumber who worked for the City of San Clemente fixing mains breaks, so not too glamorous.

author: Cindy Crawford
content: I like to work. The self-esteem and satisfaction that I get from working makes me a better person, which makes me a better mom. I feel lucky because I have the luxury of working only one or two days a week.

author: Ashley Tisdale
content: I don't drink, and I don't smoke. It's a personal preference. My mom has never drunk or smoked. I look up to my mom.

author: Rashida Jones
content: I pretty much borrow my entire beauty regime from my mom.

author: Rashida Jones
content: I know my mom said as early as she can remember letting me watch TV, my one treat a week when I was like 6 was to stay up and watch 'Saturday Night Live.'

author: Jessica Simpson
content: I want to be as healthy as I can because I'm a mom now.

author: Jessica Simpson
content: I have so much respect for my mom and all the women across the world.

author: Jenny McCarthy
content: I guess now that I think back, I used to play priest and be a funny priest. I don't know, I grew up in such a Catholic family that I kind of liked to test the boundaries a little bit and I think I had fun watching my mom laugh.

author: Jenny McCarthy
content: When I was a little girl, rocking my little dolls, I remember thinking I would be the world's best mom, and so far I've done it.

author: Natalie Portman
content: When I was in nursery school, the teachers asked me, y'know, 'What does your dad do for a living?' So I said 'He helps women get pregnant!' They called my mom and they were like, 'What exactly does your husband do?'

author: Elizabeth Warren
content: Like a lot of you, I grew up in a family on the ragged edges of the middle class. My daddy sold carpeting and ended up as a maintenance man. After he had a heart attack, my mom worked the phones at Sears so we could hang on to our house.

author: Norah Jones
