content: I can live without money, but I cannot live without love.

author: Thomas Jefferson
content: Never spend your money before you have earned it.

author: Swami Vivekananda
content: If money help a man to do good to others, it is of some value but if not, it is simply a mass of evil, and the sooner it is got rid of, the better.

author: Sam Walton
content: There is only one boss. The customer. And he can fire everybody in the company from the chairman on down, simply by spending his money somewhere else.

author: Hunter S. Thompson
content: America... just a nation of two hundred million used car salesmen with all the money we need to buy guns and no qualms about killing anybody else in the world who tries to make us uncomfortable.

author: Clare Boothe Luce
content: Money can't buy happiness, but it can make you awfully comfortable while you're being miserable.

author: Henry David Thoreau
content: Rather than love, than money, than fame, give me truth.

author: Thomas Jefferson
content: Money, not morality, is the principle commerce of civilized nations.

author: Will Rogers
content: A fool and his money are soon elected.

author: Marilyn Monroe
content: I don't want to make money, I just want to be wonderful.

author: Bob Dylan
content: What's money? A man is a success if he gets up in the morning and goes to bed at night and in between does what he wants to do.

author: Warren Buffett
content: The rich are always going to say that, you know, just give us more money and we'll go out and spend more and then it will all trickle down to the rest of you. But that has not worked the last 10 years, and I hope the American public is catching on.

author: Henry Ford
content: If money is your hope for independence you will never have it. The only real security that a man will have in this world is a reserve of knowledge, experience, and ability.

author: Steve Jobs
content: My favorite things in life don't cost any money. It's really clear that the most precious resource we all have is time.

author: Oscar Wilde
content: There is only one class in the community that thinks more about money than the rich, and that is the poor. The poor can think of nothing else.

author: P. J. O'Rourke
content: Giving money and power to government is like giving whiskey and car keys to teenage boys.

author: George Carlin
content: Most people work just hard enough not to get fired and get paid just enough money not to quit.

author: Ronald Reagan
content: Government always finds a need for whatever money it gets.

author: Ray Bradbury
content: I spent three days a week for 10 years educating myself in the public library, and it's better than college. People should educate themselves - you can get a complete education for no money. At the end of 10 years, I had read every book in the library and I'd written a thousand stories.

author: Henry Kravis
content: If you don't have integrity, you have nothing. You can't buy it. You can have all the money in the world, but if you are not a moral and ethical person, you really have nothing.

author: Benjamin Franklin
content: There are three faithful friends - an old wife, an old dog, and ready money.

author: Benjamin Franklin
content: Time is money.

author: Joseph Campbell
content: I think the person who takes a job in order to live - that is to say, for the money - has turned himself into a slave.

author: Jim Rohn
content: Time is more value than money. You can get more money, but you cannot get more time.

author: Christopher Marlowe
content: Money can't buy love, but it improves your bargaining position.

author: Henry David Thoreau
content: Do not hire a man who does your work for money, but him who does it for love of it.

author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
content: A man is usually more careful of his money than he is of his principles.

author: Will Smith
content: Money and success don't change people they merely amplify what is already there.

author: Benjamin Franklin
content: If you would know the value of money, go and try to borrow some.

author: Henry Ford
content: It is not the employer who pays the wages. Employers only handle the money. It is the customer who pays the wages.

author: Hunter S. Thompson
content: The TV business is uglier than most things. It is normally perceived as some kind of cruel and shallow money trench through the heart of the journalism industry, a long plastic hallway where thieves and pimps run free and good men die like dogs, for no good reason.

author: Marilyn Monroe
content: An actress is not a machine, but they treat you like a machine. A money machine.

author: Benjamin Franklin
content: Remember that credit is money.

author: Will Rogers
content: Politics has become so expensive that it takes a lot of money even to be defeated.

author: Benjamin Franklin
content: The use of money is all the advantage there is in having it.

author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
content: Money often costs too much.

author: Zig Ziglar
content: Money won't make you happy... but everybody wants to find out for themselves.

author: Voltaire
content: In general, the art of government consists of taking as much money as possible from one class of citizens to give to another.

author: Michael LeBoeuf
content: Waste your money and you're only out of money, but waste your time and you've lost a part of your life.

author: Michael Jordan
content: In any investment, you expect to have fun and make money.

author: Barack Obama
content: We have an obligation and a responsibility to be investing in our students and our schools. We must make sure that people who have the grades, the desire and the will, but not the money, can still get the best education possible.

author: Bill Vaughan
content: Money won't buy happiness, but it will pay the salaries of a large research staff to study the problem.

author: Mario Puzo
content: Friendship and money: oil and water.

author: Michael Jordan
content: Ultimately, if you can say that I'm a bad owner and we're winning championships, I can live with that. But if we're not making the playoffs and we're spending and losing money, then I have to look in the mirror and say maybe I'm not taking the necessary steps to doing what it takes to run an organization.

author: Wayne Dyer
content: When I chased after money, I never had enough. When I got my life on purpose and focused on giving of myself and everything that arrived into my life, then I was prosperous.

author: Marilyn Monroe
content: I've always felt toward the slightest scene, even if all I had to do in a scene was just to come in and say, 'Hi,' that the people ought to get their money's worth and that this is an obligation of mine, to give them the best you can get from me.

author: Ron Paul
content: When the federal government spends more each year than it collects in tax revenues, it has three choices: It can raise taxes, print money, or borrow money. While these actions may benefit politicians, all three options are bad for average Americans.

author: Nelson Mandela
content: Money won't create success, the freedom to make it will.

author: Ayn Rand
content: Run for your life from any man who tells you that money is evil. That sentence is the leper's bell of an approaching looter.

author: Satchel Paige
content: Work like you don't need the money. Love like you've never been hurt. Dance like nobody's watching.

author: Joel Osteen
content: God wants us to prosper financially, to have plenty of money, to fulfill the destiny He has laid out for us.

author: Eminem
content: I try to treat all the money I'm making like it's the last time I'm going to make it.

author: Henry David Thoreau
content: Money is not required to buy one necessity of the soul.

author: Bob Dylan
content: Don't matter how much money you got, there's only two kinds of people: there's saved people and there's lost people.

author: Michael Jackson
content: Because parents have power over children. They feel they have to do what their parents say. But the love of money is the root of all evil. And this is a sweet child. And to see him turn like this, this isn't him. This is not him.

author: Wayne Dyer
content: Successful people make money. It's not that people who make money become successful, but that successful people attract money. They bring success to what they do.

author: Will Rogers
content: Instead of giving money to found colleges to promote learning, why don't they pass a constitutional amendment prohibiting anybody from learning anything? If it works as good as the Prohibition one did, why, in five years we would have the smartest race of people on earth.

author: Henry Ward Beecher
content: Good nature is worth more than knowledge, more than money, more than honor, to the persons who possess it.

author: Henry David Thoreau
content: To have done anything just for money is to have been truly idle.

author: Steve Jobs
content: It's hard to tell with these Internet startups if they're really interested in building companies or if they're just interested in the money. I can tell you, though: If they don't really want to build a company, they won't luck into it. That's because it's so hard that if you don't have a passion, you'll give up.

author: Warren Buffett
content: Of the billionaires I have known, money just brings out the basic traits in them. If they were jerks before they had money, they are simply jerks with a billion dollars.

author: George Bernard Shaw
content: Lack of money is the root of all evil.

author: Robert Frost
content: Modern poets talk against business, poor things, but all of us write for money. Beginners are subjected to trial by market.

author: Andy Warhol
content: Being good in business is the most fascinating kind of art. Making money is art and working is art and good business is the best art.

author: Albert Camus
content: It is a kind of spiritual snobbery that makes people think they can be happy without money.

author: George Bernard Shaw
content: When a man says money can do anything, that settles it: he hasn't got any.

author: George Bernard Shaw
content: We are the only real aristocracy in the world: the aristocracy of money.

author: Jim Rohn
content: Don't bring your need to the marketplace, bring your skill. If you don't feel well, tell your doctor, but not the marketplace. If you need money, go to the bank, but not the marketplace.

author: Tupac Shakur
content: If I win and get the money, then the Oakland Police department is going to buy a boys' home, me a house, my family a house, and a Stop Police Brutality Center.

author: Warren Buffett
content: I never attempt to make money on the stock market. I buy on the assumption that they could close the market the next day and not reopen it for five years.

author: Douglas Adams
content: To give real service you must add something which cannot be bought or measured with money, and that is sincerity and integrity.

author: Jim Rohn
content: Money is usually attracted, not pursued.

author: Bill Gates
content: I actually thought that it would be a little confusing during the same period of your life to be in one meeting when you're trying to make money, and then go to another meeting where you're giving it away. I mean is it gonna erode your ability, you know, to make money? Are you gonna somehow get confused about what you're trying to do?

author: Steve Jobs
content: Innovation has nothing to do with how many R amp& D dollars you have. When Apple came up with the Mac, IBM was spending at least 100 times more on R &amp D. It's not about money. It's about the people you have, how you're led, and how much you get it.

author: Steve Jobs
content: Pretty much, Apple and Dell are the only ones in this industry making money. They make it by being Wal-Mart. We make it by innovation.

author: Elbert Hubbard
content: This will never be a civilized country until we spend more money for books than we do for chewing gum.

author: Steve Jobs
content: You know, my main reaction to this money thing is that it's humorous, all the attention to it, because it's hardly the most insightful or valuable thing that's happened to me.

author: Charlie Sheen
content: What is a normal childhood? We weren't rich, we were pretty middle-class. My dad survived from job to job with him taking care of so many relatives, he couldn't save any money.

author: Barack Obama
content: We need earmark reform, and when I'm President, I will go line by line to make sure that we are not spending money unwisely.

author: Michael Symon
content: My restaurants are never opened on Thanksgiving I want my staff to spend time with their family if they can. My feeling is, if I can't figure out how to make money the rest of the year so that my workers can enjoy the holidays, then I don't deserve to be an owner.

author: Davy Crockett
content: We have the right as individuals to give away as much of our own money as we please in charity but as members of Congress we have no right to appropriate a dollar of the public money.

author: Bob Hope
content: I love to go to Washington - if only to be near my money.

author: Ann Landers
content: Maturity: Be able to stick with a job until it is finished. Be able to bear an injustice without having to get even. Be able to carry money without spending it. Do your duty without being supervised.

author: Will Rogers
content: Advertising is the art of convincing people to spend money they don't have for something they don't need.

author: Bob Dylan
content: Money doesn't talk, it swears.

author: Steve Jobs
content: With our technology, with objects, literally three people in a garage can blow away what 200 people at Microsoft can do. Literally can blow it away. Corporate America has a need that is so huge and can save them so much money, or make them so much money, or cost them so much money if they miss it, that they are going to fuel the object revolution.

author: W. C. Fields
content: A rich man is nothing but a poor man with money.

author: Clint Eastwood
content: This film cost $31 million. With that kind of money I could have invaded some country.

author: Johnny Depp
content: You use your money to buy privacy because during most of your life you aren't allowed to be normal.

author: Will Rogers
content: If you make any money, the government shoves you in the creek once a year with it in your pockets, and all that don't get wet you can keep.

author: Alan Watts
content: The reason we have poverty is that we have no imagination. There are a great many people accumulating what they think is vast wealth, but it's only money... they don't know how to enjoy it, because they have no imagination.

author: H. L. Mencken
content: No one in this world has ever lost money by underestimating the intelligence of the great masses of the plain people. Nor has anyone ever lost public office thereby.

author: James Madison
content: The circulation of confidence is better than the circulation of money.

author: Mitt Romney
content: I spent my whole life in the private sector, 25 years in the private sector. I understand that when government takes more money out of the hands of people, it makes it more difficult for them to buy things. If they can't buy things, the economy doesn't grow. If the economy doesn't grow, we don't put Americans to work.

author: Walt Disney
content: Disneyland is a work of love. We didn't go into Disneyland just with the idea of making money.

author: Will Rogers
content: Let advertisers spend the same amount of money improving their product that they do on advertising and they wouldn't have to advertise it.

author: Henry Ford
content: The highest use of capital is not to make more money, but to make money do more for the betterment of life.

author: Napoleon Hill
content: Money without brains is always dangerous.

author: Paulo Coelho
content: Of course, to have money is just great because you can do what you think is important to you. I always was a rich person because money's not related to happiness.

author: Peter Drucker
content: Business, that's easily defined - it's other people's money.

author: Margaret Thatcher
content: No one would remember the Good Samaritan if he'd only had good intentions he had money as well.

author: Bob Dylan
content: I'm sick of giving creeps money off my soul.

author: Charles R. Swindoll
content: Attitude is more important than the past, than education, than money, than circumstances, than what people do or say. It is more important than appearance, giftedness, or skill.

author: Henry Ford
content: Time and money spent in helping men to do more for themselves is far better than mere giving.

author: Barack Obama
content: Money is not the only answer, but it makes a difference.

author: Walt Disney
content: I'd say it's been my biggest problem all my life... it's money. It takes a lot of money to make these dreams come true.

author: Joel Osteen
content: Prospering just doesn't have to do with money.

author: Barack Obama
content: I mean, I do think at a certain point you've made enough money.

author: Will Rogers
content: If advertisers spent the same amount of money on improving their products as they do on advertising then they wouldn't have to advertise them.

author: Barack Obama
content: The Internet didn't get invented on its own. Government research created the Internet so that all the companies could make money off the Internet. The point is, is that when we succeed, we succeed because of our individual initiative, but also because we do things together.

author: Will Rogers
content: Money and women are the most sought after and the least known about of any two things we have.

author: Jerry Garcia
content: I think it's too bad that everybody's decided to turn on drugs, I don't think drugs are the problem. Crime is the problem. Cops are the problem. Money's the problem. But drugs are just drugs.

author: Henry Ford
content: Speculation is only a word covering the making of money out of the manipulation of prices, instead of supplying goods and services.

author: Mitt Romney
content: President Obama's view of a free economy is to send your money to his friends. My vision for a free enterprise economy is to return entrepreneurship and genius and creativity to the American people!

author: Walt Disney
content: You reach a point where you don't work for money.

author: Arnold Schwarzenegger
content: Money doesn't make you happy. I now have $50 million but I was just as happy when I had $48 million.

author: Ron Paul
content: A system of capitalism presumes sound money, not fiat money manipulated by a central bank. Capitalism cherishes voluntary contracts and interest rates that are determined by savings, not credit creation by a central bank.

author: Ayn Rand
content: Money demands that you sell, not your weakness to men's stupidity, but your talent to their reason.

author: Voltaire
content: When it is a question of money, everybody is of the same religion.

author: Henry Ford
content: Money is like an arm or leg - use it or lose it.

author: Barack Obama
content: I know that campaigns can seem small, and even silly. Trivial things become big distractions. Serious issues become sound bites. And the truth gets buried under an avalanche of money and advertising. If you're sick of hearing me approve this message, believe me - so am I.

author: Barack Obama
content: You can choose a future where more Americans have the chance to gain the skills they need to compete, no matter how old they are or how much money they have. Education was the gateway to opportunity for me. It was the gateway for Michelle. And now more than ever, it is the gateway to a middle-class life.

author: Joel Osteen
content: I've never preached one sermon on money, on just finances. I want to stay away from it.

author: Thomas Sowell
content: In liberal logic, if life is unfair then the answer is to turn more tax money over to politicians, to spend in ways that will increase their chances of getting reelected.

author: Joel Osteen
content: I don't believe we are supposed to go through life defeated and not having enough money to pay our bills or send our kids to college.

author: Richard M. DeVos
content: Money cannot buy peace of mind. It cannot heal ruptured relationships, or build meaning into a life that has none.

author: Johnny Depp
content: There are necessary evils. Money is an important thing in terms of representing freedom in our world. And now I have a daughter to think about. It's really the first time I've thought about the future and what it could be.

author: Joel Osteen
content: I don't mind saying, you know, that I don't take a salary from the church, and God has blessed me with more money than I could imagine from my books.

author: Joel Osteen
content: You may never get to that perfect world that you're waiting for where everything's going to be perfect and you got that much money and your house paid off.

author: Shaquille O'Neal
content: I'm tired of hearing about money, money, money, money, money. I just want to play the game, drink Pepsi, wear Reebok.

author: Mitt Romney
content: Now workers should have the right to join unions. But unions should not be forced upon workers. And unions should not have the power to take money our of their members' paychecks to buy the support of politicians that are favored by the union bosses.

author: Robert Louis Stevenson
content: Talk is by far the most accessible of pleasures. It costs nothing in money, it is all profit, it completes our education, founds and fosters our friendships, and can be enjoyed at any age and in almost any state of health.

author: Billy Graham
content: If a person gets his attitude toward money straight, it will help straighten out almost every other area in his life.

author: Yogi Berra
content: I don't blame the players today for the money. I blame the owners. They started it. They wanna give it to 'em? More power to 'em.

author: W. C. Fields
content: It's morally wrong to allow a sucker to keep his money.

author: Joel Osteen
content: It's amazing how people will give when you don't ask. Many of them send money because they believe in the message.

author: Ray Davies
content: Money and corruption are ruining the land, crooked politicians betray the working man, pocketing the profits and treating us like sheep, and we're tired of hearing promises that we know they'll never keep.

author: Morihei Ueshiba
content: One does not need buildings, money, power, or status to practice the Art of Peace. Heaven is right where you are standing, and that is the place to train.

author: Robert Louis Stevenson
content: The price we have to pay for money is sometimes liberty.

author: Lucius Annaeus Seneca
content: We can be thankful to a friend for a few acres, or a little money and yet for the freedom and command of the whole earth, and for the great benefits of our being, our life, health, and reason, we look upon ourselves as under no obligation.

author: Andy Warhol
content: Making money is art and working is art and good business is the best art.

author: H. L. Mencken
content: The chief value of money lies in the fact that one lives in a world in which it is overestimated.

author: Donald Trump
content: Money was never a big motivation for me, except as a way to keep score. The real excitement is playing the game.

author: Judy Garland
content: I've seen the ticket, and I still can't believe it. When I see the money, I hope I don't hit the floor.

author: Sammy Davis, Jr.
content: What have I got? No looks, no money, no education. Just talent.

author: Arthur Schopenhauer
content: Money is human happiness in the abstract he, then, who is no longer capable of enjoying human happiness in the concrete devotes himself utterly to money.

author: Sun Tzu
content: If our soldiers are not overburdened with money, it is not because they have a distaste for riches if their lives are not unduly long, it is not because they are disinclined to longevity.

author: Steven Wright
content: I went to the bank and asked to borrow a cup of money. They said, 'What for?' I said, 'I'm going to buy some sugar.'

author: Alexis de Tocqueville
content: As one digs deeper into the national character of the Americans, one sees that they have sought the value of everything in this world only in the answer to this single question: how much money will it bring in?

author: Mike Tyson
content: I can inspire people on how to use money, how to get economically powerful.

author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
content: A real gentleman, even if he loses everything he owns, must show no emotion. Money must be so far beneath a gentleman that it is hardly worth troubling about.

author: Angelina Jolie
content: I don't think the money people in Hollywood have ever thought I was normal, but I am dedicated to my work and that's what counts.

author: Susan B. Anthony
content: If all the rich and all of the church people should send their children to the public schools they would feel bound to concentrate their money on improving these schools until they met the highest ideals.

author: Bill Gates
content: Well private money can take risks in a way that government money often isn't willing to.

author: Mike Tyson
content: I did my time for the rape. I paid my money to Las Vegas. I paid my dues.

author: Mike Tyson
content: I know why they don't like me because they want the money I have.

author: Mike Tyson
content: Our money is bait money, and bait money is not to be used.

author: Paula Deen
content: There was one thing my daddy wouldn't tolerate in any shape, form or fashion, and that was being unkind or rude to somebody. That was just very important to my folks. And as it turns out, that was a legacy that he left me that money can't buy, is how to be able to treat people.

author: Charles Stanley
content: Motherhood is a great honor and privilege, yet it is also synonymous with servanthood. Every day women are called upon to selflessly meet the needs of their families. Whether they are awake at night nursing a baby, spending their time and money on less-than-grateful teenagers, or preparing meals, moms continuously put others before themselves.

author: Adam Smith
content: Labour was the first price, the original purchase - money that was paid for all things. It was not by gold or by silver, but by labour, that all wealth of the world was originally purchased.

author: Henry Ward Beecher
content: Gambling with cards or dice or stocks is all one thing. It's getting money without giving an equivalent for it.

author: Thomas A. Edison
content: One might think that the money value of an invention constitutes its reward to the man who loves his work. But... I continue to find my greatest pleasure, and so my reward, in the work that precedes what the world calls success.

author: Charlie Chaplin
content: I went into the business for the money, and the art grew out of it. If people are disillusioned by that remark, I can't help it. It's the truth.

author: Karl Marx
content: The writer must earn money in order to be able to live and to write, but he must by no means live and write for the purpose of making money.

author: John Barrymore
content: Why is there so much month left at the end of the money?

author: Paulo Coelho
content: I'd have stopped writing years ago if it were for the money.

author: Andrew Carnegie
content: There is no class so pitiably wretched as that which possesses money and nothing else.

author: Tom Hopkins
content: You are your greatest asset. Put your time, effort and money into training, grooming, and encouraging your greatest asset.

author: Margaret Thatcher
content: The problem with socialism is that you eventually run out of other peoples' money.

author: Karl Marx
content: Capital is money, capital is commodities. By virtue of it being value, it has acquired the occult ability to add value to itself. It brings forth living offspring, or, at the least, lays golden eggs.

author: Kevin Bacon
content: I think one of the most pervasive evils in this world is greed and acquiring money for money's sake. Once you have six houses and a plane, it's just about a number. It's never been anything I understood.

author: Kinky Friedman
content: Money can buy you a fine dog, but only love can make him wag his tail.

author: Joe Biden
content: Now, people when I say that look at me and say, 'What are you talking about, Joe? You're telling me we have to go spend money to keep from going bankrupt?'. The answer is yes, that's what I'm telling you.

author: Hillary Clinton
content: It is a fact that around the world the elites of every country are making money.

author: Thomas Huxley
content: Economy does not lie in sparing money, but in spending it wisely.

author: Ray Bradbury
content: When I graduated from high school, it was during the Depression and we had no money.

author: Brendan Behan
content: The big difference between sex for money and sex for free is that sex for money usually costs a lot less.

author: Phyllis Diller
content: There's so little money in my bank account, my scenic checks show a ghetto.

author: George Best
content: I spent a lot of money on booze, birds and fast cars. The rest I just squandered.

author: Marlene Dietrich
content: There is a gigantic difference between earning a great deal of money and being rich.

author: Evan Esar
content: America believes in education: the average professor earns more money in a year than a professional athlete earns in a whole week.

author: Virginia Woolf
content: A woman must have money and a room of her own if she is to write fiction.

author: W. Somerset Maugham
content: If a nation values anything more than freedom, it will lose its freedom, and the irony of it is that if it is comfort or money that it values more, it will lose that too.

author: Emo Philips
content: You don't appreciate a lot of stuff in school until you get older. Little things like being spanked every day by a middle-aged woman: Stuff you pay good money for in later life.

author: Robert Kiyosaki
content: I have a problem with too much money. I can't reinvest it fast enough, and because I reinvest it, more money comes in. Yes, the rich do get richer.

author: Francois de La Rochefoucauld
content: Flattery is a kind of bad money, to which our vanity gives us currency.

author: Orson Welles
content: I do not suppose I shall be remembered for anything. But I don't think about my work in those terms. It is just as vulgar to work for the sake of posterity as to work for the sake of money.

author: Thomas Sowell
content: People who identify themselves as conservatives donate money to charity more often than people who identify themselves as liberals. They donate more money and a higher percentage of their incomes.

author: Hillary Clinton
content: We can't go to people who have lost their job at GM and say, 'Oh, by the way, we are going to pay money to build a road here or inoculate children there,' unless we can demonstrate that it is in America's interest. I happen to think it is.

author: Hillary Clinton
content: You know, people make a lot of money talking about me, don't they?

author: Marcus Tullius Cicero
content: The sinews of war are infinite money.

author: Francis Bacon
content: Money is like manure, of very little use except it be spread.

author: Johnny Cash
content: Success is having to worry about every damn thing in the world, except money.

author: John D. Rockefeller
content: I have ways of making money that you know nothing of.

author: Arthur Schopenhauer
content: Because people have no thoughts to deal in, they deal cards, and try and win one another's money. Idiots!

author: Samuel Johnson
content: Getting money is not all a man's business: to cultivate kindness is a valuable part of the business of life.

author: Roger Babson
content: Property may be destroyed and money may lose its purchasing power but, character, health, knowledge and good judgement will always be in demand under all conditions.

author: Donald Trump
content: Love him or hate him, Trump is a man who is certain about what he wants and sets out to get it, no holds barred. Women find his power almost as much of a turn-on as his money.

author: Orson Welles
content: Criminals are never very amusing. It's because they're failures. Those who make real money aren't counted as criminals. This is a class distinction, not an ethical problem.

author: Mason Cooley
content: The passion for money is never fickle.

author: Mason Cooley
content: To understand someone, find out how he spends his money.

author: Atal Bihari Vajpayee
content: Poverty is multidimensional. It extends beyond money incomes to education, health care, political participation and advancement of one's own culture and social organisation.

author: J. Paul Getty
content: If you can actually count your money, then you're not a rich man.

author: Julia Cameron
content: What we really want to do is what we are really meant to do. When we do what we are meant to do, money comes to us, doors open for us, we feel useful, and the work we do feels like play to us.

author: Arthur Godfrey
content: I'm proud to pay taxes in the United States the only thing is, I could be just as proud for half the money.

author: Sophocles
content: Those whose life is long still strive for gain, and for all mortals all things take second place to money.

author: Kim Kardashian
content: I don't talk about money.

author: Robert Fulghum
content: I've always thought anyone can make money. Making a life worth living, that's the real test.

author: Quentin Tarantino
content: It's very important that every movie I do makes money because I want the people that had the faith in me to get their money back.

author: Marco Rubio
content: We need transparency in government spending. We need to put each government expenditure online so every Floridian can see where their tax money is being spent.

author: Josh Billings
content: Time is like money, the less we have of it to spare the further we make it go.

author: Rose Kennedy
content: I've had an exciting time I married for love and got a little money along with it.

author: Paul McCartney
content: George wrote Taxman, and I played guitar on it. He wrote it in anger at finding out what the taxman did. He had never known before then what could happen to your money.

author: Adam Smith
content: All money is a matter of belief.

author: David Bowie
content: I'm looking for backing for an unauthorized auto-biography that I am writing. Hopefully, this will sell in such huge numbers that I will be able to sue myself for an extraordinary amount of money and finance the film version in which I will play everybody.

author: Jesse Jackson
content: A man who cannot be enticed by money or intimidated by the threat of jail or death has two of the strongest weapons that anyone has to offer.

author: Terry Pratchett
content: Taxation is just a sophisticated way of demanding money with menaces.

author: Jonathan Swift
content: A wise person should have money in their head, but not in their heart.

author: Suze Orman
content: If you are worried about job security and do not have an adequate emergency fund (ideally eight months' worth of living expenses stashed away in a federally insured bank or credit union), you need to focus more on saving money than paying down the balance on your credit cards.

author: Gabriel Garcia Marquez
content: No, not rich. I am a poor man with money, which is not the same thing.

author: Henny Youngman
content: What's the use of happiness? It can't buy you money.

author: Davy Crockett
content: If one man in the country could take all the money, what was the use of passing any bills about it?

author: J. K. Rowling
content: You lose your individuality a huge amount when you have no money, and I certainly had that experience.

author: John D. Rockefeller
content: I know of nothing more despicable and pathetic than a man who devotes all the hours of the waking day to the making of money for money's sake.

author: Sallust
content: Neither soldiers nor money can defend a king but only friends won by good deeds, merit, and honesty.

author: David Korten
content: As long as you have a system that is based on the rational that if you are making money you are thereby making a contribution to society, these financial rogue practices will continue.

author: Alveda King
content: A majority, perhaps as many as 75 percent, of abortion clinics are in areas with high minority populations. Abortion apologists will say this is because they want to serve the poor. You don't serve the poor, however, by taking their money to terminate their children.

author: Marian Wright Edelman
content: If we think we have ours and don't owe any time or money or effort to help those left behind, then we are a part of the problem rather than the solution to the fraying social fabric that threatens all Americans.

author: Josh Billings
content: Knowledge is like money: the more he gets, the more he craves.

author: Josh Billings
content: I haven't got as much money as some folks, but I've got as much impudence as any of them, and that's the next thing to money.

author: Josh Billings
content: It ain't often that a man's reputation outlasts his money.

author: Josh Billings
content: Money will buy a pretty good dog, but it won't buy the wag of his tail.

author: Sonny Bono
content: Don't cling to fame. You're just borrowing it. It's like money. You're going to die, and somebody else is going to get it.

author: Lady Gaga
content: You shouldn't have to have money to have a luxury fragrance.

author: Bobby Darin
content: A group or an artist shouldn't get his money until his boss gets his.

author: William Makepeace Thackeray
content: What money is better bestowed than that of a schoolboy's tip? How the kindness is recalled by the recipient in after days! It blesses him that gives and him that takes.

author: Fidel Castro
content: Capitalism is using its money we socialists throw it away.

author: Jesse Ventura
content: Remember that government doesn't earn one single dollar it spends. In order for you to get money from the government, that money must first be taken from somebody else.

author: Suze Orman
content: Opposites may attract, but I wouldn't put my money on a relationship of financial opposites.

author: George Burns
content: I can't afford to die I'd lose too much money.

author: Tennessee Williams
content: You can be young without money but you can't be old without it.

author: Hedy Lamarr
content: American men, as a group, seem to be interested in only two things, money and breasts. It seems a very narrow outlook.

author: Coretta Scott King
content: I'm fulfilled in what I do. I never thought that a lot of money or fine clothes - the finer things of life - would make you happy. My concept of happiness is to be filled in a spiritual sense.

author: W. H. Auden
content: It is a sad fact about our culture that a poet can earn much more money writing or talking about his art than he can by practicing it.

author: Kinky Friedman
content: I've always said money may buy you a fine dog, but only love can make it wag its tail.

author: Oliver Herford
content: A man must love a thing very much if he not only practices it without any hope of fame and money, but even... without any hope of doing it well.

author: Clarence Day
content: A moderate addiction to money may not always be hurtful but when taken in excess it is nearly always bad for the health.

author: Kevin O'Leary
content: Here's how I think of my money - as soldiers - I send them out to war everyday. I want them to take prisoners and come home, so there's more of them.

author: Hedy Lamarr
content: I know why most people never get rich. They put the money ahead of the job. If you just think of the job, the money will automatically follow. This never fails.

author: Rush Limbaugh
content: Well, the chairman of Federal Reserve just made his move to rescue Barack Obama. We're gonna have QE3. We're gonna print some more money.

author: Craig Bruce
content: Why are people unemployed? Because there is no work. Why is there no work? Because people are not buying products and services. Why are people not buying products and services? Because they have no money. Why do people have no money? Because they are unemployed.

author: Lady Gaga
content: I don't want to make money I want to make a difference.

author: Eric Cantor
content: Look, we know we screwed up when we were in the majority. We fell in love with power. We spent way too much money - especially on earmarks. There was too much corruption when we ran this place. We were guilty. And that's why we lost.

author: Paul McCartney
content: To keep the record straight, it wasn't always John and Yoko. We've all accused one another of various business things we tend to be pretty paranoid by now, as you can imagine. There's a lot of money involved.

author: Doug Coupland
content: People will always choose more money over more sex.

author: Benjamin Tucker
content: Almost the only persons who may be said to comprehend even approximately the significance, principles, and purposes of Socialism are the chief leaders of the extreme wings of the Socialistic forces, and perhaps a few of the money kings themselves.

author: Oliver Wendell Holmes
content: Put not your trust in money, but put your money in trust.

author: Tyler Perry
content: If you don't want my God here, you don't want me here either. God has been too good to me to go and try to sell out to get some money.

author: Molly Ivins
content: As they say around the Texas Legislature, if you can't drink their whiskey, screw their women, take their money, and vote against 'em anyway, you don't belong in office.

author: Ovid
content: Nowadays nothing but money counts: a fortune brings honors, friendships the poor man everywhere lies low.

author: J. Paul Getty
content: Money is like manure. You have to spread it around or it smells.

author: Christina Aguilera
content: I'm not really religious but very spiritual. I give money to this company that manufactures hearing aids on a regular basis. More people should really hear me sing. I have a gift from God.

author: Bo Bennett
content: Anyone who wants to sell you overnight success or wealth is not interested in your success they are interested in your money.

author: Alan Greenspan
content: Look, I'm very much in favor of tax cuts, but not with borrowed money. And the problem that we've gotten into in recent years is spending programs with borrowed money, tax cuts with borrowed money, and at the end of the day that proves disastrous. And my view is I don't think we can play subtle policy here.

author: Peter Schuyler
content: Until we totally change the way we elect our leaders, until we remove private money from public campaigns, lying will be the de facto method of governance in this country.

author: Lily Tomlin
content: But there are too many people that make so much money at the cost of lives of other humans and for no reason but to make the money.

author: Havelock Ellis
content: Thinking in its lower grades, is comparable to paper money, and in its higher forms it is a kind of poetry.

author: Horace Mann
content: Unfaithfulness in the keeping of an appointment is an act of clear dishonesty. You may as well borrow a person's money as his time.

author: Robert Graves
content: There's no money in poetry, but then there's no poetry in money, either.

author: Paul Ryan
content: When I was waiting tables, washing dishes, or mowing lawns for money, I never thought of myself as stuck in some station in life. I was on my own path, my own journey, an American journey where I could think for myself, decide for myself, define happiness for myself.

author: Lady Gaga
content: I decided to pursue music, so I dropped out of school and I told my parents I didn't want any money from them. I got three jobs and I just hit the ground running.

author: Jack White
content: A lot of people in the media, and some everyday people, really aren't in search of the truth. They're in search of something worse than that. Money, yeah. I think the media's the kind of a thing where the truth doesn't win, because it's no fun. The truth's no fun.

author: Doug Coupland
content: If someone decides to be a musician now, it means because there is no hope of money at the end of it, it means they really want to be a musician. And if someone is writing now, there is no hope for money at the end of it.

author: Doug Coupland
content: I think money is due for some sort of collapse. People are going to realize that money has a half-life, like radioactive elements.

author: Willie Nelson
content: I am not a pig farmer. The pigs had a great time, but I didn't make any money.

author: Michelle Obama
content: Clearly this is a tough economic time, and a lot of families are hurting. So when we talk to parents, we talk about small changes for kids and things that don't cost extra money. Like adding water and eliminating sugary drinks and sodas. That's going to save money right there. Or adding a few more vegetables.

author: Newt Gingrich
content: The idea that a congressman would be tainted by accepting money from private industry or private sources is essentially a socialist argument.

author: Theodor Adorno
content: If time is money, it seems moral to save time, above all one's own, and such parsimony is excused by consideration for others. One is straight-forward.

author: Donald Rumsfeld
content: Congress, the press, and the bureaucracy too often focus on how much money or effort is spent, rather than whether the money or effort actually achieves the announced goal.

author: Donald Rumsfeld
content: Presidential leadership needn't always cost money. Look for low- and no-cost options. They can be surprisingly effective.

author: Paul Auster
content: All I wanted to do was write - at the time, poems, and prose, too. I guess my ambition was simply to make money however I could to keep myself going in some modest way, and I didn't need much, I was unmarried at the time, no children.

author: Lee Iacocca
content: We at Chrysler borrow money the old-fashioned way. We pay it back.

author: John Dewey
content: No man's credit is as good as his money.

author: Ken Venturi
content: Victory is everything. You can spend the money but you can never spend the memories.

author: Christopher Hitchens
content: Of course, I do everything for money.

author: Dave Barry
content: It was Public Art, defined as art that is purchased by experts who are not spending their own personal money.

author: Jean-Jacques Rousseau
content: Money is the seed of money, and the first guinea is sometimes more difficult to acquire than the second million.

author: Marian Wright Edelman
content: We do not have a money problem in America. We have a values and priorities problem.

author: Lady Gaga
content: What I've learned is that you really don't need to be a celebrity or have money or have the paparazzi following you around to be famous.

author: Lady Gaga
content: Some artists are working to buy the mansion or whatever the element of fame must bear, but I spend all my money on my show.

author: Lady Gaga
content: I don't care about money.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: The forties, seventies, and the nineties, when money was scarce, were great periods, when the art world retracted but it was also reborn.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: Money is something that can be measured art is not. It's all subjective.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: Art usually only makes the news in America when the subject is money.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: Not to say people shouldn't get rich from art. I adore the alchemy wherein artists who cast a complex spell make rich people give them their money. (Just writing it makes me cackle.) But too many artists have been making money without magic.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: One argument goes that recessions are good for female artists because when money flies out the window, women are allowed in the house. The other claims that when money ebbs, so do prospects for women.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: In the seventies, a group of American artists seized the means not of production but of reproduction. They tore apart visual culture at a time of no money, no market, and no one paying attention except other artists. Vietnam and Watergate had happened everything in America was being questioned.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: The last time money left the art world, intrepid types maxed out their credit cards and opened galleries, and a few of them have become the best in the world.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: Much good art got made while money ruled I like a lot of it, and hardship and poverty aren't virtues. The good news is that, since almost no one will be selling art, artists - especially emerging ones - won't have to think about turning out a consistent style or creating a brand. They'll be able to experiment as much as they want.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: When money and hype recede from the art world, one thing I won't miss will be what curator Francesco Bonami calls the 'Eventocracy.' All this flashy 'art-fair art' and those highly produced space-eating spectacles and installations wow you for a minute until you move on to the next adrenaline event.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: 'Untitled' is a time machine that can transport you to 1992, an edgy moment when the art world was crumbling, money was scarce, and artists like Tiravanija were in the nascent stages of combining Happenings, performance art, John Cage, Joseph Beuys, and the do-it-yourself ethos of punk. Meanwhile, a new art world was coming into being.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: Now people look at 'The Scream' or Van Gogh's 'Irises' or a Picasso and see its new content: money. Auction houses inherently equate capital with value.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: Art is for anyone. It just isn't for everyone. Still, over the past decade, its audience has hugely grown, and that's irked those outside the art world, who get irritated at things like incomprehensibility or money.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: I love art dealers. In some ways, they're my favorite people in the art world. Really. I love that they put their money where their taste is, create their own aesthetic universes, support artists, employ people, and do all of this while letting us see art for free. Many are visionaries.

author: Jerry Saltz
content: When museums are built these days, architects, directors, and trustees seem most concerned about social space: places to have parties, eat dinner, wine-and-dine donors. Sure, these are important these days - museums have to bring in money - but they gobble up space and push the art itself far away from the entrance.

author: Paul Wellstone
content: The people of this country, not special interest big money, should be the source of all political power.

author: Suze Orman
content: Many people are in the dark when it comes to money, and I'm going to turn on the lights.

author: Suze Orman
content: Take free money. No matter how in debt you are, if your employer offers a matching contribution on a 401(k) or other retirement vehicle, you must sign up and contribute enough to get the maximum company match each year. Think of it as a bonus.

author: Gary Oldman
content: Growing up in a particular neighborhood, growing up in a working-class family, not having much money, all of those things fire you and can give you an edge, can give you an anger.

author: Demetri Martin
content: I think it would be cool if you were writing a ransom note on your computer, if the paper clip popped up and said, 'Looks like you're writing a ransom note. Need help? You should use more forceful language, you'll get more money.'

author: Rita Rudner
content: My Vegas act is how I make my money.

author: Cesare Pavese
content: No woman marries for money they are all clever enough, before marrying a millionaire, to fall in love with him first.

author: Heidi Klum
content: But all the money in the world cannot make you happy either, so there has to be a balance.

author: Alanis Morissette
content: Making a movie requires 20 to 500 people to make and a lot of money and the stakes are a lot higher.

author: Brandon Boyd
content: Music has always been my back door to life. It is important for people to find something that excites them. I like the concept that if you do what excites you, you will be rewarded generously, whatever form reward takes, which is not necessarily money.

author: Chloe Sevigny
content: I definitely spend the most money on shoes, partly because vintage footwear can be a little funky - in a bad way. I like to keep things pretty simple up top and then go weird with the shoes.

author: Billy Sunday
content: If there is no hell, a good many preachers are obtaining money under false pretenses.

author: Dan Millman
content: Money is neither my god nor my devil. It is a form of energy that tends to make us more of who we already are, whether it's greedy or loving.

author: Fareed Zakaria
content: In a very weak economy, when you say 'cut government spending,' what you mean is you're laying off school teachers and you're de-funding various programs that put money into the economy. This means you have more unemployed people that then draw unemployment benefits and don't pay taxes.

author: Paul Ryan
content: We need to reclaim our American system of limited government, low taxes, reasonable regulations, and sound money, which has blessed us with unprecedented prosperity. And it has done more to help the poor than any other economic system ever designed.

author: Paul Ryan
content: That's the real secret to job creation - not borrowing and spending more money in Washington.

author: Paul Ryan
content: We need to stop spending money we don't have.

author: Paul Ryan
content: What did the taxpayers get out of the Obama stimulus? More debt. That money wasn't just spent and wasted - it was borrowed, spent, and wasted.

author: Emil Zatopek
content: A runner must run with dreams in his heart, not money in his pocket.

author: Jenny McCarthy
content: I'm free of stress and worries now because if I don't like something I'm doing, I just find the fun in it instead of being miserable. Let me have fun with the people I work with, let me have fun making money - when I grew up so poor, ya know?

author: Mark Zuckerberg
content: This is our commitment to users and the people who use our service, is that Facebook's a free service. It's free now. It will always be free. We make money through having advertisements and things like that.

author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
content: Is it not odd that the only generous person I ever knew, who had money to be generous with, should be a stockbroker.

author: Taylor Swift
content: A development deal is where they're giving you recording time and money to record, but not promising that they'll put an album out.

author: Hilaire Belloc
content: I'm tired of love I'm still more tired of rhyme but money gives me pleasure all the time.

author: Louisa May Alcott
content: Money is the root of all evil, and yet it is such a useful root that we cannot get on without it any more than we can without potatoes.

author: Richard Roeper
content: Wal-Mart doesn't really care about your faith. Wal-Mart cares if you have money to spend, and it is going to be as generic as possible in exploiting the holiday season for every buck it can make.

author: Helen Rowland
content: Nowadays love is a matter of chance, matrimony a matter of money and divorce a matter of course.

author: Ted Turner
content: Life is a game. Money is how we keep score.

author: Denis Leary
content: Jon Stewart is exactly the same guy he's always been, only with money. He knows that the moment he really believes he's important, the funny goes away and he becomes Bill O'Reilly, except shorter and Jewish.

author: Demetri Martin
content: And of course I didn't make any money from stand up for years, so I had temp jobs. That was the way I made money.

author: Carter G. Woodson
content: They still have some money, and they have needs to supply. They must begin immediately to pool their earnings and organize industries to participate in supplying social and economic demands.

author: Martin Scorsese
content: There are two kinds of power you have to fight. The first is the money, and that's just our system. The other is the people close around you, knowing when to accept their criticism, knowing when to say no.

author: Marc Chagall
content: Work isn't to make money you work to justify life.

author: David Suzuki
content: If we pollute the air, water and soil that keep us alive and well, and destroy the biodiversity that allows natural systems to function, no amount of money will save us.

author: Jean-Luc Godard
content: I pity the French Cinema because it has no money. I pity the American Cinema because it has no ideas.

author: Willie Nelson
content: If you got the money honey I got the time and when you run out of money honey I run out of time.

author: Scott Adams
content: When you hire that first person, then you're a boss. You've got performance reviews. You've got complaints about not making enough money. You've got people who are just going to sell your story to the tabloids.

author: Lysander Spooner
content: The only security men can have for their political liberty, consists in keeping their money in their own pockets.

author: Ron Livingston
content: It can be liberating to get fired because you realize the world doesn't end. There's other ways to make money, better jobs.

author: Spike Milligan
content: Money couldn't buy friends, but you got a better class of enemy.

author: Juliana Hatfield
content: I don't really care about money. I find money boring and accounting boring, so I'm probably not going to ever make a lot of money.

author: Erykah Badu
content: The music business is motivated by money. Music is motivated by energy and feelings.

author: Theodore White
content: The flood of money that gushes into politics today is a pollution of democracy.

author: Samuel Goldwyn
content: Spare no expense to save money on this one.

author: Samuel Goldwyn
content: Here I am paying big money to you writers and what for? All you do is change the words.

author: Suze Orman
content: The key to making money is to stay invested.

author: Helen Rowland
content: A fool and her money are soon courted.

author: Billy Wilder
content: France is a place where the money falls apart in your hands but you can't tear the toilet paper.

author: Drew Barrymore
content: Great dad. Yeah, he would ask me for money on birthdays and, you know, inappropriate times. And I just wrote him off like, 'You're not a father.' I just learned you cannot emotionally invest in people who are not attainable.

author: Richard Wagner
content: Divorce is one of the most financially traumatic things you can go through. Money spent on getting mad or getting even is money wasted.

author: Freddie Mercury
content: And, we have no such thing as a budget anymore. Our manager freaks when we show him the bill. We're lavish to the bone, but all our money goes back into the product.

author: Adam Smith
content: Labor was the first price, the original purchase - money that was paid for all things.

author: Stevie Nicks
content: My other family is Fleetwood Mac. I don't need the money, but there's an emotional need for me to go on the road again. There's a love there we're a band of brothers.

author: Yoko Ono
content: Countries have lost their culture because what they wanted was money. Money became the running theme in every country and culture was sacrificed.

author: Shia LaBeouf
content: My generation will actually be the first generation that is tamer than the one that came before it, and it will probably be poorer less fun and less money.

author: Tiger Woods
content: Money and fame made me believe I was entitled. I was wrong and foolish.

author: Tiger Woods
content: I felt that I had worked hard my entire life and deserved to enjoy all the temptations around me. I felt I was entitled, and thanks to money and fame, I didn't have to go far to find them.

author: Tom Felton
content: One thing that people keep on saying to me is that the wealth and the fame must have made up for missing out on my childhood. But the idea of money - putting a price on your childhood - is ridiculous. You will never get those years back and you can't put a price on them.

author: Tom Felton
content: I bought a lot of rubbish things that kids buy: skateboards and clothes and typical teenage stuff. And, as soon as I could, I wasted a lot of money on cars - BMW's mostly - for myself and my family.

author: Jack Nicholson
content: We are going as fast as we can as soon as we can. We're in a race against time, until we run out of money.

author: Humphrey Bogart
content: The only point in making money is, you can tell some big shot where to go.

author: Julie Andrews
content: I am a liberated woman. And I do believe if a woman does equal work she should be paid equal money. But personally I am feminine and I do like male authority to lean on.

author: Brigitte Bardot
content: I never left France for Hollywood nor stashed my money in Switzerland.

author: Al Gore
content: As I have said for many years throughout this land, we're borrowing money from China to buy oil from the Persian Gulf to burn it in ways that destroy the future of human civilization. Every bit of that has to change.

author: Sammy Davis, Jr.
content: I had more clothes than I had closets, more cars than garage space, but no money.

author: Suze Orman
content: Money is such an amazing teacher: What you choose to do with your money shows whether you are truly powerful or powerless.

author: Mary Quant
content: Having money is rather like being a blond. It is more fun but not vital.

author: Jennifer Lopez
content: People assume I'm out there having this great life, but money doesn't erase the pain. When you're young you barrel through life, making choices without thinking of repercussions. A few years down the line, you wake up in a certain place and wonder how the hell you got there.

author: P. T. Barnum
content: Money is in some respects life's fire: it is a very excellent servant, but a terrible master.

author: Rose Kennedy
content: It's our money, and we're free to spend it any way we please.

author: Daniel Radcliffe
content: I don't know what to do with it. I'm very fortunate to have it, and it gives you room to maneuver. But the main thing about having money is it means you don't have to worry about it. And that for me is a lovely thing. It's not for fast cars and hookers.

author: Michael Caine
content: I don't work very much, and I just sit here waiting for a script that I can't refuse - and I'm not talking about money.

author: Barbara Bush
content: I decided I ought to pick a project that would not be controversial, that would not really cost the government a lot of money.

author: Jean-Michel Basquiat
content: I had some money, I made the best paintings ever. I was completely reclusive, worked a lot, took a lot of drugs. I was awful to people.

author: Newt Gingrich
content: Only the elites despise earning money.

author: Lawrence Welk
content: If you put all your strength and faith and vigor into a job and try to do the best you can, the money will come.

author: Justin Bieber
content: I've got my eye on a few things to spend my money on. I've got my own bank card but I am really good with money. I don't spend too much at all.

author: Katy Perry
content: You have to spend a lot to make a lot. It's not like I'm sitting on top of a pile of money.

author: Jay-Z
content: As kids we didn't complain about being poor we talked about how rich we were going to be and made moves to get the lifestyle we aspired to by any means we could. And as soon as we had a little money, we were eager to show it.

author: Christopher Marlowe
content: While money doesn't buy love, it puts you in a great bargaining position.

author: Ernie Banks
content: When I wake up in the morning, I feel like a billionaire without paying taxes.

author: Naguib Mahfouz
content: I wake up early in the morning and walk for an hour. If I have something to write, I prefer to write in the morning until midday, and in the afternoon, I eat.

author: Naguib Mahfouz
content: I was a government employee in the morning and a writer in the evening.

author: Taylor Momsen
content: I kind of woke up one morning and was like, 'Oh I see what's happening, I get everything'. I woke up and was like, 'I get it, I'm a product.'

author: Peter O'Toole
content: We were doing it under the most extraordinary circumstances, but the first out of the tent in the morning would be David Lean. He said to me on the very first day of shooting, Pete, this is the beginning of a great adventure.

author: Tom Waits
content: Most songs have meager beginnings. You wake up in the morning, you throw on your suspenders, and you subvocalize and just think. They seem to form like calcium. I can't think of a story right off the bat that was that interesting. I write things on the back of my hand, usually, and sing into a tape recorder.

author: John Hawkes
content: Hitchhiking was such a pure form of existence. You'd wake up in the morning, and you'd have no idea what your day was going to be. And that's something I've never been able to shake. I loved that.

author: George Osborne
content: I had the closest thing I have ever had to an out-of-body experience lying in bed one morning. I turned on the 'Today' programme and item four on the news was: 'The shadow chancellor has ruled himself out of the leadership.' I lay there thinking that's interesting, then I realised it was me.

author: Ian Botham
content: I half knew what to expect when I saw the cricket ground in the morning. It was when I started to talk to people working out there, I began to find what I was looking for.

author: Bruce Willis
content: I wake up laughing. Yes, I wake up in the morning and there I am just laughing my head off.

author: Izaak Walton
content: I love such mirth as does not make friends ashamed to look upon one another next morning.

author: Rachel Stevens
content: I am really passionate about my career and my music and I am so lucky to be able to do what I do for a job, so for all the early morning starts and long days, I could never trade it all in.

author: David Schwimmer
content: London is completely unpredictable when it comes to weather. You'll start a scene, and it's a beautiful morning. You get there at 6 in the morning, set up, you start the scene, start shooting. Three hours later, it is pitch black and rainy.

author: Jim Garrison
content: I derive no pleasure from prosecuting a man, even though I know he's guilty do you think I could sleep at night or look at myself in the mirror in the morning if I hounded an innocent man?

author: Bo Jackson
content: I was the type of guy that used to get up in the morning and go out and just out run everybody on the field without stretching or warming up or anything.

author: George Strait
content: Of all the songs I've recorded, 'Amarillo By Morning' always sticks out in my mind.

author: George Strait
content: I don't mind traveling that much when I can go somewhere and stay there for a while, but touring is different. You rarely see anything. You get there early in the morning and you're resting all day, and you go in and do a sound check, and you do the show, and then bam you're gone.

author: Gaston Bachelard
content: The repose of sleep refreshes only the body. It rarely sets the soul at rest. The repose of the night does not belong to us. It is not the possession of our being. Sleep opens within us an inn for phantoms. In the morning we must sweep out the shadows.

author: Kevin Garnett
content: Too much coffee. Too much coffee and Gatorade. It's a hell of a mix. If you're ever tired in the morning, just try that mix, and tell me what you think.

author: Tony Parsons
content: My principal motivation is supporting my family, which is not a bad reason for getting up in the morning. That's always been my motivation - to take care of the people who rely on me.

author: Celine Dion
content: I have to say that when you tour the world, obviously, the jetlags and different hours and ways of living and traveling, a lot of hours in the plane, and you wake up in the morning and you're not quite sure where you are, and it is very tiring.

author: George Aiken
content: If we were to wake up some morning and find that everyone was the same race, creed and color, we would find some other causes for prejudice by noon.

author: Giuliana Rancic
content: I eat as much as the next girl, but I work my butt of in the gym every morning! The key is moderation. I splurge on the weekend. A big bowl of pasta and a delicious slice of cake for dessert are my favorites.

author: John Hench
content: In live action movies, you just hope that everything works. Because the actor may had a bad morning and doesn't play good, or accidents happen continuously. Many things contradict what you are trying to say. But in cartoons, nothing contradict what you want to say.

author: Todd Barry
content: I've never been a TV junkie. I remember watching Letterman way back when he had a morning show.

author: Larry Page
content: If you're changing the world, you're working on important things. You're excited to get up in the morning.

author: Ray Romano
content: My wife gets all the money I make. I just get an apple and clean clothes every morning.

author: Michael Morpurgo
content: Wherever my story takes me, however dark and difficult the theme, there is always some hope and redemption, not because readers like happy endings, but because I am an optimist at heart. I know the sun will rise in the morning, that there is a light at the end of every tunnel.

author: Philip Pullman
content: What I couldn't help noticing was that I learned more about the novel in a morning by trying to write a page of one than I'd learned in seven years or so of trying to write criticism.

author: Andrew Wiles
content: I was so obsessed by this problem that I was thinking about it all the time - when I woke up in the morning, when I went to sleep at night - and that went on for eight years.

author: Andrew Wiles
content: There's also a sense of freedom. I was so obsessed by this problem that I was thinking about if all the time - when I woke up in the morning, when I went to sleep at night, and that went on for eight years.

author: Sheena Easton
content: Prince used to call me up 3am in the morning and invite me to hear some of his new songs.

author: Anne Tyler
content: The one ironclad rule is that I have to try. I have to walk into my writing room and pick up my pen every weekday morning.

author: Jenson Button
content: To drive an F1 car you have to be a little mad. On the morning of a race there's a mix of excitement and fear. If it's a wet track, then it's worse as you're not in control most of the time, which is the thing all drivers fear the most.

author: Jenson Button
content: A lot of people think Formula One isn't a sport because everyone drives a car when they go to work in the morning. But we're pulling up to six G on a corner or during breaking, which is almost like being a fighter pilot. So we have to do a lot of work on our neck muscles.

author: Anna Held
content: How many women have the courage to start properly with a cold, cold bath early in the morning? I jump in, throw the water, cold as ice, and after the first plunge I am happy.

author: Laurell K. Hamilton
content: I am not a morning person.

author: Ben Hogan
content: I couldn't wait for the sun to come up the next morning so that I could get out on the course again.

author: Corey Feldman
content: Whereas I used to get depressed or neurotic or dwell on things, I see my son's bright eyes and smile in the morning, and suddenly, I don't feel like I'm depressed anymore. There's nothing to be depressed about when you've got that.

author: Satyajit Ray
content: Most of the top actors and actresses may be working in ten or twelve films at the same time, so they will give one director two hours and maybe shoot in Bombay in the morning and Madras in the evening. It happens.

author: Kofi Annan
content: The question is the morning after. What sort of Iraq do we wake up to after the bombing? What happens in the region? What impact could it have? These are questions leaders I have spoken to have posed.

author: Gail Simmons
content: I never really drank coffee in college, but now I'm on my feet all day and out all night and can't believe it hasn't always been in my life. When morning comes I crave it.

author: Samantha Morton
content: The thing with me is, if I wake up one morning and I'm not happy working as an actress, I'll stop. It's not something I have to do. It's not a vocation.

author: Jo Nesbo
content: Those golden minutes before you are completely awake, when your mind is just drifting, you have no censorship you are ready to develop any kind of idea. That's when I come up with the best and worst ideas. That is the privilege of being a writer - that you can stay in bed for an hour in the morning and it's work time.

author: Sarah Michelle Gellar
content: The episodes all blend together for me, so I don't remember. I can't even remember what I had for breakfast this morning. I always feel I must be such a disappointment to them.

author: Heston Blumenthal
content: I still love doing what I do, and I'm really lucky to get up in the morning and want to go to work.

author: Frank Auerbach
content: It seems to me madness to wake up in the morning and do something other than paint, considering that one may not wake up the following morning.

author: Namie Amuro
content: Now, on nights that I can't sleep, I play video games alone until the morning.

author: Joe Manchin
content: In West Virginia, the most vulnerable people we have are people who get up every morning and go to work.

author: David Gest
content: She got the magazine on a Wednesday morning, and on Thursday announced our marriage was over.

author: Mark Wahlberg
content: I don't go to Mass every day. But I go to church every day. Just sitting there, thinking - it's a great way to start the morning, you know? You feel so good coming out, and your approach to everything is suddenly really clear.

author: Harriet Ann Jacobs
content: But to the slave mother New Year's day comes laden with peculiar sorrows. She sits on her cold cabin floor, watching the children who may all be torn from her the next morning and often does she wish that she and they might die before the day dawns.

author: Patricia Cornwell
content: On the last morning of Virginia's bloodiest year since the Civil War, I built a fire and sat facing a window of darkness where at sunrise I knew I would find the sea.

author: Abraham Pais
content: I spent every night until four in the morning on my dissertation, until I came to the point when I could not write another word, not even the next letter. I went to bed. Eight o'clock the next morning I was up writing again.

author: Brit Hume
content: You know, the market was down yesterday... my first thought when I heard-just on a personal basis, when I heard there had been this attack and I saw the futures this morning, which were really in the tank, I thought, Time to buy.

author: Kirstie Alley
content: I have a hotline to the tabloids. When I get up in the morning, I call the Star, and the last thing at night, I call them. I want them to have the inside track.

author: Jon Huntsman, Jr.
content: Normal people don't just wake up in the morning and say I think it'd be a good idea to run for president of the United States.

author: Harold H. Greene
content: The attorney general would call at 5 o'clock in the evening and say: 'Tomorrow morning we are going to try to integrate the University of Mississippi. Get us a memo on what we're likely to do, and what we can do if the governor sends the National Guard there.'

author: Carlos Fuentes
content: I am a morning writer I am writing at eight-thirty in longhand and I keep at it until twelve-thirty, when I go for a swim. Then I come back, have lunch, and read in the afternoon until I take my walk for the next day's writing.

author: Geraldine Brooks
content: Both my mum and dad were great readers, and we would go every Saturday morning to the library, and my sister and I had a library card when we could pass off something as a signature, and all of us would come with an armful of books.

author: Rory McIlroy
content: If I'm playing in the morning, I'll get some carbs early: porridge with chopped banana. If I'm playing in the afternoon, I'll start with less carbs and have some eggs and fruit for breakfast, then a light lunch about 90 minutes before I play, so I don't feel sluggish or full.

author: Pharrell Williams
content: Remember my first tenet in getting dressed is how you feel in the morning. So if you're not being true blue to that, it usually shows.

author: Mo Rocca
content: Yes, I still love 'South Park,' but I also love morning TV now.

author: Mitch McConnell
content: We hear the stories every day now: the father who puts on a suit every morning and leaves the house so his daughter doesn't know he lost his job, the recent college grad facing up to the painful reality that the only door that's open to her after four years of study and a pile of debt is her parents'. These are the faces of the Obama economy.

author: Matthew Rhys
content: I was shocked by the amount of Welsh people in L.A. We'd go to this British pub to watch the 'Six Nations' early in the morning and I remember the first time I walked in it was just a sea of red.

author: R. L. Stine
content: I'm obsessed with radio. It's a good start to Sunday morning.

author: R. L. Stine
content: A real New Yorker likes the sound of a garbage truck in the morning.

author: Mika Brzezinski
content: I am up at 3:30, reading the op-ed pages and getting ready to be on the air by 6 A.M. on the set of 'Morning Joe,' and after three hours of TV and two hours on the radio, it is only 12 noon.

author: Mika Brzezinski
content: I have mugs of hot water every morning because the studio is cold, and also because it makes my throat sound clearer.

author: Mika Brzezinski
content: My salary situation at 'Morning Joe' wasn't right. I made five attempts to fix it, then realized I'd made the same mistake every time: I apologised for asking.

author: Mika Brzezinski
content: On 'Morning Joe' I can say what I think, be my sometimes unorthodox self, have fun, yet be serious as well.

author: Martin Mull
content: You'd have to think that you're at least decent, or you couldn't get up every morning and do it. I think if I live long enough, I might be pretty good.

author: Harvey Pekar
content: I wake up every morning in a cold sweat, regardless of how well things went the day before. And put that I said that in a somewhat but not completely tongue-in-cheek way.

author: Joe Slovo
content: When a man has been consistently battering his wife, he shouldn't expect a bouquet of roses from her the morning after he promises to stop.

author: George Horace Lorimer
content: You've got to get up every morning with determination if you're going to go to bed with satisfaction.

author: Criss Angel
content: I had an amazing childhood, lots of love. But my dad worked his tail off, getting up at 4 in the morning and going off at 5, 6 o'clock, yet he always had time to spend with his kids and his wife.

author: James Inhofe
content: I have to say when we talk about the treatment of these prisoners that I would guess that these prisoners wake up every morning thanking Allah that Saddam Hussein is not in charge of these prisons.

author: Nellie Bly
